jobs.title: PSS Analyst - THE NORTH FACE
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: The North Face EMEA is looking for an outstanding PSS Analyst to join our team based in Stabio, Switzerland. Focus of this role will be on Retail Partner and Concession channel, with the key objective to create and implement new ways of working to elevate our Merchandise Planning and Trading aligned with the DTC business. You will be responsible for merchandise trading including all inventory management and Retail KPIs management and cross-functional go-to-market alignment and performance tracking. Also, you will play a key role to further strengthen our Retail Partner business in ITALY and GAS region, working closely with our Retail and Concession manager throughout the selling campaign. How you will make a difference - Lead and evolve best-in-class digital Merchandising Planning process fully aligned with our DTC strategy, positioning and with the seasonal merchandising strategy; - Full ownership to manage the performance of the defined assortment, working closely with a cross-functional team dedicated to B&M (Buyers and Retail Partner managers) ; - Work alongside our TNG buying team and PSS managers to manage seasonal, monthly and weekly intake requirements; - Working on Inventory Management and coverage optimization at product/size level and across our DCs, with focus on trading performance and stock level optimization, delivering against The North Face B&M and financial objectives; - Full alignment with overall go-to-market calendar to ensure seamless execution and strong accelerated growth; - Working in partnership with Buying, PSS and Sales Ops team on the development of yearly and seasonal merchandise financial plans across Revenue, COGS, Discounts, Margins, ASP and Units - Set standards of trading and buying processes and deliver best practices to be shared across our cross-functional teams, proactively proposing continuous improvements in processes and tools in collaboration with DTC counterparts and VF Central Team to reach trading excellence and best-in-class inventory management execution; - Constantly striving for innovation and to optimise ways of working by contributing in setting up new processes, tools and report. What you need to succeed? - 3+ yrs. of relevant work experience with proven track record in Merchandising Planning, trading or equivalent Business Planning/Trading role - Language skills: fluent in English and Italian - Relevant Merchandise Planning and analysis experience within a fast-paced retail business - Deep understanding of the fast-paced B&M environment and merchandising success factors for Retails - Outstanding understanding of all the Retail KPIs and how they are influencing stores’ P&L - Excellent knowledge of Excel. Knowledge of Access, SAP and BI systems is a plus. - Excellent analytical skills - Outstanding business- and financial acumen - Consumer-first, data savvy and brand-driven mindset - Highly performance driven and result-oriented team player who is getting things done - High maturity in managing organisational complexity and effective communication - Strategic and operational decision-making A formal education and subsequent University Bachelor or Master’s degree in related fields are nice to have, but we are most interested in your total experience and professional achievements. What is in it for you? - Playing a key role to accelerate our B&M growth within one of our leading brands - Joining an ambitious Retail and Concession team embedded into The North Face and VF, one of the largest, globally leading multi-brand organisations with great long-term career opportunities - Purpose-led, international, fun and challenging working environment We're in the business of unleashing human potential, driven by the ideas, energy and commitment of our people. That's why we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical and financial well-being for all VF associates. When it comes to benefits, we're the total package. - A supportive feedback-based culture where respect and integrity guide us in what we do - An inclusive international environment where people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles and nationalities love working together - Be part of an iconic lifestyle brand in a multi brand, multi countries organization - On site gym offering health and well-being initiatives - 50% discount on all VF brands Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity As a purpose-led, performance driven company, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Join the North Face Family The North Face was built on a love for the outdoors and the desire to enable all types of exploration, for all people, from their backyards to the Himalayas. Over the last 50 years we've lived by our "true north," the belief that exploration has the power to change us, to challenge us and to help us see the world from new perspectives. To help ignite a global movement of outdoor exploration, love for the natural world and an unwavering commitment to protect it, we welcome and encourage new participants to the outdoors. We extend our reach through support of non-profit organizations, establishing programs that connect participants with close-to-home recreation opportunities, and creating a connection with young leaders, inspiring them to explore and conserve. As we enter our sixth decade, we pledge to: - Empower exploration and the thrill of the unknown for as many people as possible - Protect the places where we live, play, and operate - Evolve the way we make our products by improving our environmental performance and social responsibility in the supply chain Our Parent Company, VF Corporation VF is one of the world's largest apparel, footwear and accessories companies connecting people to the lifestyles, activities and experiences they cherish through our family of iconic outdoor, active and workwear brands. At the heart of our journey lies our company-wide purpose: We power movements of sustainable and active lifestyles for the betterment of people and our planet. This is our purpose. It's the reason we come to work every day. It's a commitment shared by our global associates across all brands. Our purpose unites us and leads us to pursue our goals, together. This is our calling. Learn more at vfc.com If you like what you have read and want to join our team then we would like to hear from you! Please submit your application in English, as that's our common language! R-20230303-0011

Purpose-led, international, fun and challenging working environment ## Contatto - A supportive feedback-based culture where respect and integrity guide us in what we do - An inclusive international environment where people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles and nationalities love working together - Be part of an iconic lifestyle brand in a multi brand, multi countries organization - On site gym offering health and well-being initiatives - 50% discount on all VF brands - Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity ## La nostra azienda - The North Face was built on a love for the outdoors and the desire to enable all types of exploration, for all people, from their backyards to the Himalayas. - Over the last 50 years we've lived by our "true north," the belief that exploration has the power to change us, to challenge us and to help us see the world from new perspectives. - To help ignite a global movement of outdoor exploration, love for the natural world and an unwavering commitment to protect it, we welcome and encourage new participants to the outdoors. - We extend our reach through support of non-profit organizations, establishing programs that connect participants with close-to-home recreation opportunities, and creating a connection with young leaders, inspiring them to explore and conserve. ## La nostra missione - VF Corporation VF is one of the world's largest apparel, footwear and accessories companies connecting people to the lifestyles, activities and experiences they cherish through our family of iconic outdoor, active and workwear brands. - At the heart of our journey lies our company-wide purpose: We power movements of sustainable and active lifestyles for the betterment of people and our planet. - This is our purpose. descriptionByLocale.it: Mansioni - Guidare ed evolvere un processo di pianificazione del merchandising digitale di altissimo livello, pienamente allineato con la nostra strategia DTC, il posizionamento e la strategia di merchandising stagionale; - Piena responsabilità nella gestione delle performance dell'assortimento definito, lavorando a stretto contatto con un team cross-funzionale dedicato a B&M (acquirenti e responsabili dei partner retail); - Collaborare con il nostro team di acquisto TNG e i manager PSS per gestire i requisiti di approvvigionamento stagionali, mensili e settimanali; - Lavorare sulla gestione dell'inventario e sull'ottimizzazione della copertura a livello di prodotto/taglia e nei nostri DC, con focus sulle performance di trading e sull'ottimizzazione dei livelli di stock, raggiungendo gli obiettivi finanziari e di B&M di The North Face; - Pieno allineamento con il calendario generale go-to-market per garantire un'esecuzione senza soluzione di continuità e una forte crescita accelerata; - Collaborare con il team di acquisto, PSS e Sales Ops nello sviluppo di piani finanziari di merchandising annuali e stagionali su ricavi, COGS, sconti, margini, ASP e unità; - Stabilire standard per i processi di trading e acquisto e fornire best practice da condividere tra i nostri team cross-funzionali, proponendo proattivamente miglioramenti continui nei processi e negli strumenti in collaborazione con le controparti DTC e il team centrale VF per raggiungere l'eccellenza nel trading e una gestione dell'inventario di altissimo livello; - Cercare costantemente innovazione e ottimizzare i metodi di lavoro contribuendo alla creazione di nuovi processi, strumenti e report. ## Requisiti - 3+ anni di esperienza lavorativa rilevante con comprovata esperienza nella pianificazione del merchandising, nel trading o in un ruolo equivalente di pianificazione aziendale/trading; - Competenze linguistiche: fluente in inglese e italiano; - Esperienza rilevante nella pianificazione e analisi del merchandising in un'azienda retail dinamica; - Profonda comprensione dell'ambiente B&M dinamico e dei fattori di successo del merchandising per il retail; - Eccellente comprensione di tutti gli indicatori chiave di performance del retail e di come influenzano il P&L dei negozi; - Ottima conoscenza di Excel. La conoscenza di Access, SAP e dei sistemi BI è un plus; - Eccellenti capacità analitiche; - Eccezionale acume aziendale e finanziario; - Mentalità orientata al consumatore, esperta di dati e guidata dal brand; - Giocatore di squadra altamente orientato alle prestazioni e ai risultati; - Alta maturità nella gestione della complessità organizzativa e comunicazione efficace; - Capacità decisionali strategiche e operative; - Una formazione formale e una successiva laurea triennale o magistrale in campi correlati sono un plus, ma siamo maggiormente interessati alla tua esperienza complessiva e ai tuoi successi professionali. ## Cosa offriamo - Un ruolo chiave per accelerare la nostra crescita B&M all'interno di uno dei nostri marchi leader; - Entrare a far parte di un ambizioso team Retail e Concession integrato in The North Face e VF, una delle più grandi organizzazioni multi-brand leader a livello globale con grandi opportunità di carriera a lungo termine; - Ambiente di lavoro internazionale, stimolante, divertente e orientato agli obiettivi; ## Contatto - Una cultura basata sul feedback e sul supporto, dove il rispetto e l'integrità ci guidano in ciò che facciamo; - Un ambiente internazionale inclusivo dove persone di diversi background, stili di vita e nazionalità amano lavorare insieme; - Far parte di un marchio iconico di lifestyle in un'organizzazione multi-brand e multi-paese; - Palestra in loco con iniziative per la salute e il benessere; - Sconto del 50% su tutti i marchi VF; - Free to Be, Inclusione & Diversità. ## La nostra azienda - The North Face è stata costruita sull'amore per la natura e sul desiderio di consentire tutti i tipi di esplorazione, per tutte le persone, dai loro giardini all'Himalaya. - Negli ultimi 50 anni abbiamo vissuto secondo il nostro "vero nord", la convinzione che l'esplorazione abbia il potere di cambiarci, sfidarci e aiutarci a vedere il mondo da nuove prospettive. - Per aiutare a innescare un movimento globale di esplorazione all'aperto, amore per il mondo naturale e un impegno incrollabile per proteggerlo, accogliamo e incoraggiamo nuovi partecipanti all'outdoor. - Estendiamo la nostra portata supportando organizzazioni non profit, istituendo programmi che collegano i partecipanti a opportunità di svago vicino a casa e creando un legame con i giovani leader, ispirandoli a esplorare e conservare. ## La nostra missione - Potenziare l'esplorazione e il brivido dell'ignoto per quante più persone possibile; - Proteggere i luoghi in cui viviamo, giochiamo e operiamo; - Evolvere il modo in cui realizziamo i nostri prodotti migliorando le nostre prestazioni ambientali e la responsabilità sociale nella catena di approvvigionamento. ## La nostra azienda madre - VF Corporation VF è una delle più grandi aziende di abbigliamento, calzature e accessori al mondo che collega le persone agli stili di vita, alle attività e alle esperienze che amano attraverso la nostra famiglia di marchi iconici di outdoor, active e workwear. - Al centro del nostro percorso c'è il nostro scopo aziendale: alimentiamo movimenti di stili di vita sostenibili e attivi per il miglioramento delle persone e del nostro pianeta. - Questo è il nostro scopo. È il motivo per cui veniamo a lavorare ogni giorno. È un impegno condiviso dai nostri collaboratori globali in tutti i marchi. - Il nostro scopo ci unisce e ci guida a perseguire i nostri obiettivi, insieme. Questa è la nostra chiamata. Scopri di più su vfc.com.
descriptionByLocale.de: Aufgaben - Führen und Weiterentwickeln eines erstklassigen digitalen Merchandising-Planungsprozesses, der vollständig mit unserer DTC-Strategie, Positionierung und der saisonalen Merchandising-Strategie abgestimmt ist; - Volle Verantwortung für die Verwaltung der Leistung des definierten Sortiments, in enger Zusammenarbeit mit einem funktionsübergreifenden Team, das sich B&M (Einkäufer und Retail-Partner-Manager) widmet; - Zusammenarbeit mit unserem TNG-Einkaufsteam und den PSS-Managern zur Verwaltung der saisonalen, monatlichen und wöchentlichen Anforderungen an den Wareneingang; - Arbeiten an der Bestandsverwaltung und der Optimierung der Abdeckung auf Produkt-/Größenebene und in unseren DCs, mit Fokus auf Handelsleistung und Bestandsoptimierung, um die B&M- und Finanzziele von The North Face zu erreichen; - Vollständige Abstimmung mit dem gesamten Go-to-Market-Kalender, um eine nahtlose Ausführung und ein starkes beschleunigtes Wachstum sicherzustellen; - Zusammenarbeit mit dem Einkaufs-, PSS- und Sales-Ops-Team bei der Entwicklung von jährlichen und saisonalen finanziellen Merchandising-Plänen für Umsatz, COGS, Rabatte, Margen, ASP und Einheiten; - Festlegen von Standards für Handels- und Einkaufsprozesse und Bereitstellung von Best Practices, die mit unseren funktionsübergreifenden Teams geteilt werden können, proaktive Vorschläge für kontinuierliche Verbesserungen von Prozessen und Tools in Zusammenarbeit mit DTC-Gegenstücken und dem VF-Zentralteam, um Handels-Exzellenz und eine erstklassige Bestandsverwaltung zu erreichen; - Ständige Suche nach Innovationen und Optimierung der Arbeitsweise durch Mitwirkung an der Einrichtung neuer Prozesse, Tools und Berichte. ## Anforderungen - 3+ Jahre relevante Berufserfahrung mit nachweislicher Erfolgsbilanz in der Merchandising-Planung, im Handel oder in einer vergleichbaren Rolle in der Geschäftsplanung/im Handel; - Sprachkenntnisse: fließend in Englisch und Italienisch; - Relevante Erfahrung in der Merchandising-Planung und -Analyse in einem schnelllebigen Einzelhandelsunternehmen; - Tiefes Verständnis der schnelllebigen B&M-Umgebung und der Erfolgsfaktoren für Merchandising im Einzelhandel; - Hervorragendes Verständnis aller Einzelhandels-KPIs und deren Einfluss auf die P&L der Geschäfte; - Hervorragende Excel-Kenntnisse. Kenntnisse in Access, SAP und BI-Systemen sind von Vorteil; - Hervorragende analytische Fähigkeiten; - Herausragendes geschäftliches und finanzielles Verständnis; - Verbraucherorientierte, datenaffine und markenorientierte Denkweise; - Leistungsorientierter und ergebnisorientierter Teamplayer, der Dinge erledigt; - Hohe Reife in der Bewältigung organisatorischer Komplexität und effektiver Kommunikation; - Strategische und operative Entscheidungsfindung; - Eine formale Ausbildung und ein anschließender Bachelor- oder Master-Abschluss in verwandten Bereichen sind von Vorteil, aber wir interessieren uns am meisten für Ihre Gesamterfahrung und beruflichen Erfolge. ## Was wir bieten - Eine Schlüsselrolle, um unser B&M-Wachstum innerhalb einer unserer führenden Marken zu beschleunigen; - Beitritt zu einem ehrgeizigen Retail- und Concession-Team, das in The North Face und VF integriert ist, eine der größten, weltweit führenden Multi-Brand-Organisationen mit großartigen langfristigen Karrieremöglichkeiten; - Zweckorientiertes, internationales, unterhaltsames und herausforderndes Arbeitsumfeld. ## Kontakt - Eine unterstützende, feedbackbasierte Kultur, in der Respekt und Integrität uns in unserem Handeln leiten; - Eine inklusive internationale Umgebung, in der Menschen mit unterschiedlichen Hintergründen, Lebensstilen und Nationalitäten gerne zusammenarbeiten; - Teil einer ikonischen Lifestyle-Marke in einer Multi-Brand-, Multi-Länder-Organisation sein; - Vor-Ort-Fitnessstudio mit Gesundheits- und Wellness-Initiativen; - 50 % Rabatt auf alle VF-Marken; - Free to Be, Inklusion & Diversität. ## Unser Unternehmen - The North Face wurde aus der Liebe zur Natur und dem Wunsch heraus gegründet, alle Arten von Erkundungen für alle Menschen zu ermöglichen, von ihren Hinterhöfen bis hin zum Himalaya. - In den letzten 50 Jahren haben wir nach unserem "wahren Norden" gelebt, dem Glauben, dass Erkundung die Kraft hat, uns zu verändern, uns herauszufordern und uns zu helfen, die Welt aus neuen Perspektiven zu sehen. - Um eine globale Bewegung der Outdoor-Erkundung, der Liebe zur Natur und des unerschütterlichen Engagements zu ihrem Schutz zu entfachen, heißen wir neue Teilnehmer im Outdoor-Bereich willkommen und ermutigen sie. - Wir erweitern unsere Reichweite durch die Unterstützung von gemeinnützigen Organisationen, die Einrichtung von Programmen, die Teilnehmer mit Freizeitmöglichkeiten in der Nähe ihres Wohnorts verbinden, und die Schaffung einer Verbindung zu jungen Führungskräften, die sie inspirieren, zu erkunden und zu bewahren. ## Unsere Mission - Erkundung und den Nervenkitzel des Unbekannten für so viele Menschen wie möglich ermöglichen; - Die Orte schützen, an denen wir leben, spielen und arbeiten; - Die Art und Weise, wie wir unsere Produkte herstellen, weiterentwickeln, indem wir unsere Umweltleistung und soziale Verantwortung in der Lieferkette verbessern. ## Unser Mutterunternehmen - VF Corporation VF ist eines der weltweit größten Unternehmen für Bekleidung, Schuhe und Accessoires, das Menschen durch unsere Familie ikonischer Outdoor-, Active- und Workwear-Marken mit den Lebensstilen, Aktivitäten und Erfahrungen verbindet, die sie schätzen. - Im Mittelpunkt unserer Reise steht unser unternehmensweites Ziel: Wir treiben Bewegungen für nachhaltige und aktive Lebensstile voran, um das Leben der Menschen und unseren Planeten zu verbessern. - Dies ist unser Ziel. Es ist der Grund, warum wir jeden Tag zur Arbeit gehen. Es ist ein Engagement, das von unseren globalen Mitarbeitern über alle Marken hinweg geteilt wird. - Unser Ziel vereint uns und führt uns dazu, unsere Ziele gemeinsam zu verfolgen. Das ist unsere Berufung. Erfahren Sie mehr auf vfc.com.
descriptionByLocale.fr: Missions - Diriger et faire évoluer un processus de planification du merchandising numérique de premier ordre, entièrement aligné sur notre stratégie DTC, notre positionnement et la stratégie de merchandising saisonnière; - Assumer l'entière responsabilité de la gestion des performances de l'assortiment défini, en travaillant en étroite collaboration avec une équipe interfonctionnelle dédiée à B&M (acheteurs et responsables des partenaires de vente au détail); - Collaborer avec notre équipe d'achat TNG et les responsables PSS pour gérer les besoins d'approvisionnement saisonniers, mensuels et hebdomadaires; - Travailler sur la gestion des stocks et l'optimisation de la couverture au niveau des produits/taille et dans nos centres de distribution, en se concentrant sur les performances commerciales et l'optimisation des niveaux de stock, en atteignant les objectifs financiers et B&M de The North Face; - Assurer une pleine cohérence avec le calendrier global de mise sur le marché pour garantir une exécution fluide et une forte croissance accélérée; - Travailler en partenariat avec les équipes d'achat, PSS et Sales Ops sur le développement de plans financiers de merchandising annuels et saisonniers couvrant les revenus, les coûts des marchandises vendues (COGS), les remises, les marges, l'ASP et les unités; - Définir des normes pour les processus de commerce et d'achat et fournir des meilleures pratiques à partager entre nos équipes interfonctionnelles, en proposant de manière proactive des améliorations continues des processus et des outils en collaboration avec les homologues DTC et l'équipe centrale VF pour atteindre l'excellence commerciale et une exécution de gestion des stocks de premier ordre; - Rechercher constamment l'innovation et optimiser les méthodes de travail en contribuant à la mise en place de nouveaux processus, outils et rapports. ## Exigences - 3+ ans d'expérience professionnelle pertinente avec un historique de réussite avéré dans la planification du merchandising, le commerce ou un rôle équivalent en planification/commerce d'entreprise; - Compétences linguistiques : maîtrise de l'anglais et de l'italien; - Expérience pertinente en planification et analyse du merchandising dans une entreprise de vente au détail dynamique; - Compréhension approfondie de l'environnement B&M dynamique et des facteurs de succès du merchandising pour le commerce de détail; - Excellente connaissance des KPI du commerce de détail et de leur influence sur le compte de résultat des magasins; - Excellente maîtrise d'Excel. La connaissance d'Access, SAP et des systèmes BI est un plus; - Excellentes compétences analytiques; - Sens aigu des affaires et des finances; - Mentalité axée sur le consommateur, orientée données et guidée par la marque; - Joueur d'équipe hautement performant et orienté résultats qui fait avancer les choses; - Grande maturité dans la gestion de la complexité organisationnelle et communication efficace; - Prise de décision stratégique et opérationnelle; - Une formation formelle et un diplôme universitaire de niveau Bachelor ou Master dans des domaines connexes sont un plus, mais nous nous intéressons surtout à votre expérience globale et à vos réalisations professionnelles. ## Ce que nous offrons - Jouer un rôle clé pour accélérer notre croissance B&M au sein de l'une de nos marques leaders; - Rejoindre une équipe Retail et Concession ambitieuse intégrée à The North Face et VF, l'une des plus grandes organisations multi-marques leader au niveau mondial avec de grandes opportunités de carrière à long terme; - Un environnement de travail international, stimulant, amusant et axé sur les défis. ## Contact - Une culture basée sur le feedback et le soutien, où le respect et l'intégrité nous guident dans ce que nous faisons; - Un environnement international inclusif où des personnes de divers horizons, styles de vie et nationalités aiment travailler ensemble; - Faire partie d'une marque lifestyle emblématique dans une organisation multi-marques et multi-pays; - Salle de sport sur site proposant des initiatives de santé et de bien-être; - 50 % de réduction sur toutes les marques VF; - Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversité. ## Notre entreprise - The North Face a été fondée sur l'amour de la nature et le désir de permettre tous types d'exploration, pour tous, de leur jardin jusqu'à l'Himalaya. - Au cours des 50 dernières années, nous avons vécu selon notre "véritable nord", la conviction que l'exploration a le pouvoir de nous transformer, de nous défier et de nous aider à voir le monde sous de nouvelles perspectives. - Pour aider à déclencher un mouvement mondial d'exploration en plein air, d'amour pour le monde naturel et d'engagement indéfectible à le protéger, nous accueillons et encourageons de nouveaux participants à l'extérieur. - Nous étendons notre portée en soutenant des organisations à but non lucratif, en établissant des programmes qui connectent les participants à des opportunités de loisirs proches de chez eux et en créant un lien avec de jeunes leaders, les inspirant à explorer et à conserver. ## Notre mission - Favoriser l'exploration et le frisson de l'inconnu pour le plus grand nombre possible de personnes; - Protéger les lieux où nous vivons, jouons et opérons; - Faire évoluer la manière dont nous fabriquons nos produits en améliorant nos performances environnementales et notre responsabilité sociale dans la chaîne d'approvisionnement. ## Notre société mère - VF Corporation VF est l'une des plus grandes entreprises mondiales de vêtements, chaussures et accessoires, reliant les gens aux styles de vie, activités et expériences qu'ils chérissent à travers notre famille de marques emblématiques de vêtements d'extérieur, actifs et de travail. - Au cœur de notre parcours se trouve notre objectif d'entreprise : nous alimentons des mouvements de modes de vie durables et actifs pour le bien des personnes et de notre planète. - C'est notre objectif. C'est la raison pour laquelle nous venons travailler chaque jour. C'est un engagement partagé par nos collaborateurs mondiaux à travers toutes les marques. - Notre objectif nous unit et nous pousse à poursuivre nos objectifs, ensemble. C'est notre vocation. En savoir plus sur vfc.com.

jobs.title: Analyst, FP&A
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: VF Corporation is looking for an exceptional FP&A Analyst , Shared Functions to join our Finance team based in Stabio, Switzerland. Let’s talk about the role! As FP&A Analyst, will support brand FP&A activities related to P&L Planning and Forecasting focusing on Sales & Margin of Wholesale channel, playing a key role to create alignment around Gross-To-Net, analysing the main channel and accounts dynamics and performances as well as supporting the brand to make the right decisions to maximize marginality. You will gather information on forecast & plan data, which has to be loaded in the reporting tool (BPC) and deliver reports, as determined by area leads and Senior Management. To achieve the goals of the department you will work closely together with your colleagues of the Finance department as well as other functions such as DTC, Planning, Sales and report directly to the Director, FP&A. We expect that you will deliver unbeatable results whilst fulfilling the following aspects of the FP&A Analyst role: - Manage and handle Financial GTN planning and Forecasting tools and ensure consistency and accuracy of figures submitted in the systems; - Ensure that actuals are aligned to expectations and proactively analyse and report variances vs forecast with - Keep continuous alignment between financial & commercial GTN to ensure alignment/balance between Sales, Margin and inventory targets; - Deliver forecasting accuracy excellence and pro-actively analyze any critical trends or dynamics within the channels and the main accounts; - Ensure that all recurring requests related to forecast and plan are delivered accurately and on time: store roll, key accounts details, revenue walk, margin bridge, category overviews, etc.; - Support the 5YR rolling financial plan (LRP) partnering with the global strategy, global merch planning & Ops and Product. Understand the brand strategy and support in drawing conclusions through financial analysis; - Assist in ad-hoc analysis on request of European or Global/Corporate management Skills for Success You will be a professional with proven experience in business controlling and financial planning, with a strong analytical mindset and: - Minimum bachelor’s degree in finance area (accounting, controlling) and 1/2 years of related work experience preferrable; - Solid software and PC skills (Advanced in Excel, PowerPoint, SAP/COGNOS, BPC experience is a plus) - Great time management and prioritizing skills with the ability to meet strict deadlines - Strong English command (written and verbal) - Proven communication skills in interacting with people from a non-financial background - Excellent organizational skills & goal-oriented About VF VF is a global apparel company connecting people to the lifestyles they cherish through our family of iconic brands. At the heart of our journey lies our purpose: We power movements of sustainable and active lifestyles for the betterment of people and our planet. This is our purpose. It’s the reason we come to work every day. Our purpose unites us and leads us to pursue our goals, together. This is our calling. Learn more at vfc.com What’s in it For You We’re in the business of unleashing human potential, driven by the ideas, energy and commitment of our people. That’s why we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical and financial well-being for all VF associates. When it comes to benefits, we’re the total package. - A supportive feedback-based culture where respect and integrity guide us in what we do - An inclusive international environment where people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles and nationalities love working together - Be part of an iconic lifestyle brand in a multi brand, multi countries organization - On site gym offering health and well-being initiatives - A discount card with 50% on all VF brands - Break out areas offering complimentary hot drinks Free to Be, Inclusion & Diversity As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. R-20260323-0032

titleByLocale.fr: Analyste, FP&A

descriptionByLocale.en: FP&A Analyst, Shared Functions VF Corporation è alla ricerca di un eccezionale FP&A Analyst, Shared Functions per unirsi al nostro team di Finanza con sede a Stabio, Svizzera. Parliamo del ruolo! Come FP&A Analyst, supporterà le attività di FP&A relative al P&L Planning e Forecasting focalizzandosi sui Sales & Margin del canale Wholesale, giocando un ruolo chiave per creare allineamento intorno a Gross-To-Net, analizzando le dinamiche e le prestazioni principali del canale e degli account, nonché supportando la marca a prendere le decisioni giuste per massimizzare la marginalità. Raccoglierà informazioni sui dati di previsione e pianificazione, che devono essere caricati nel tool di reporting (BPC) e fornirà rapporti, come determinato dai lead di area e dalla Direzione Senior. Per raggiungere gli obiettivi del dipartimento lavorerà in stretta collaborazione con i colleghi del dipartimento di Finanza nonché con altre funzioni come DTC, Planning, Vendite e riferirà direttamente al Direttore, FP&A. Ci aspettiamo che tu consegua risultati ineguagliabili mentre soddisfi gli aspetti seguenti del ruolo di FP&A Analyst: - Gestire e gestire gli strumenti di pianificazione e previsione finanziari GTN e assicurare la consistenza e l'accuratezza dei dati inviati nei sistemi; - Assicurarsi che gli attuali siano allineati alle aspettative e analizzare e segnalare proattivamente le variazioni rispetto alla previsione con; - Mantenere l'allineamento continuo tra GTN finanziario e commerciale per assicurare l'allineamento/bilancio tra obiettivi di vendita, margine e inventario; - Consegna dell'accuratezza eccezionale della previsione e analizza proattivamente qualsiasi tendenza critica o dinamica all'interno dei canali e degli account principali; - Assicurarsi che tutte le richieste ricorrenti relative alla previsione e al piano siano consegnate con precisione e in tempo: dettagli di store roll, dettagli degli account chiave, walk di ricavo, ponte di margine, panorami di categoria, ecc.; - Supportare il piano finanziario a 5 anni (LRP) in partnership con la strategia globale, la pianificazione globale del merchandising & Ops e il prodotto. Comprendere la strategia della marca e supportare la conclusione attraverso l'analisi finanziaria; - Assistere nell'analisi ad-hoc su richiesta della gestione europea o globale/corporate ## Requisiti Sarai un professionista con esperienza provata in business controlling e pianificazione finanziaria, con un forte mindset analitico e: - Laurea in area finanziaria (contabilità, controllo) e 1/2 anni di esperienza lavorativa preferibile; - Solide abilità software e PC (Avanzato in Excel, PowerPoint, SAP/COGNOS, esperienza in BPC è un plus); - Grande gestione del tempo e abilità di priorizzare con la capacità di rispettare scadenze strette; - Ottima conoscenza dell'inglese (scritto e orale); - Abilità di comunicazione provata nell'interagire con persone di background non finanziario; - Eccellenti abilità organizzative e orientate ai risultati ## Cosa offriamo Siamo in affari per liberare il potenziale umano, guidati dalle idee, dall'energia e dal impegno delle nostre persone. È per questo che offriamo benefici completi che incoraggiano la salute mentale, fisica e finanziaria per tutti gli associati di VF. Quando si tratta di benefici, siamo il pacchetto completo. - Una cultura di feedback supportiva dove il rispetto e l'integrità ci guidano in ciò che facciamo; - Un ambiente internazionale inclusivo dove le persone di diversi background, stili di vita e nazionalità amano lavorare insieme; - Partecipare a un marchio di stile di vita iconico in un'organizzazione multibranda e multinazionale; - Palestra in loco offrendo iniziative per la salute e il benessere; - Carta di sconto con 50% su tutte le marche VF; - Aree di pausa offrendo bevande calde gratuite ## Contatto R-20260323-0032

Quando si tratta di benefici, siamo il pacchetto completo. - Una cultura di feedback solidale dove il rispetto e l'integrità ci guida in ciò che facciamo; - Un ambiente internazionale inclusivo dove le persone di diversi background, stili di vita e nazionalità amano lavorare insieme; - Partecipare a un marchio di stile di vita iconico in un'organizzazione multibranda e multinazionale; - Palestra in loco che offre iniziative per la salute e il benessere; - Carta di sconto con 50% su tutte le marche VF; - Aree di pausa offrendo bevande calde gratuite ## Contatto R-20260323-0032
descriptionByLocale.de: FP&A Analyst, Shared Functions VF Corporation sucht einen außergewöhnlichen FP&A Analyst, Shared Functions, um unser Finanzteam in Stabio, Schweiz, zu verstärken. Lassen Sie uns über die Rolle sprechen! Als FP&A Analyst unterstützen Sie die FP&A-Aktivitäten im Zusammenhang mit der P&L-Planung und -Prognose, wobei der Schwerpunkt auf den Verkaufs- und Margenanalysen des Großhandelskanals liegt. Sie spielen eine Schlüsselrolle bei der Schaffung von Übereinstimmung in Bezug auf Brutto-zu-Netto, analysieren die wichtigsten Dynamiken und Leistungen des Kanals und der Konten und unterstützen die Marke dabei, die richtigen Entscheidungen zu treffen, um die Rentabilität zu maximieren. Sie sammeln Planungs- und Prognosedaten, die in das Berichtstool (BPC) geladen werden müssen, und liefern Berichte, wie von den Bereichsleitern und der Senior Management festgelegt. Um die Ziele der Abteilung zu erreichen, arbeiten Sie eng mit Kollegen aus der Finanzabteilung sowie mit anderen Funktionen wie DTC, Planung, Vertrieb zusammen und berichten direkt an den Direktor, FP&A. Wir erwarten, dass Sie außergewöhnliche Ergebnisse erzielen, während Sie die folgenden Aspekte der Rolle eines FP&A Analysten erfüllen: - Verwaltung und Pflege der Finanzplanungs- und Prognosetools für GTN und Sicherstellung der Konsistenz und Genauigkeit der in die Systeme eingegebenen Daten; - Sicherstellen, dass die aktuellen Zahlen den Erwartungen entsprechen, und proaktive Analyse und Berichterstattung über Abweichungen von der Prognose; - Kontinuierliche Abstimmung zwischen finanziellen und kommerziellen GTN, um die Übereinstimmung/Balance zwischen Verkaufs-, Margen- und Bestandszielen sicherzustellen; - Lieferung außergewöhnlicher Prognosegenauigkeit und proaktive Analyse kritischer Trends oder Dynamiken innerhalb der wichtigsten Kanäle und Konten; - Sicherstellen, dass alle wiederkehrenden Anforderungen in Bezug auf Prognosen und Pläne genau und rechtzeitig geliefert werden: Store-Roll-Details, Key-Account-Details, Umsatz-Walks, Margenbrücken, Kategoriebereiche usw.; - Unterstützung des 5-Jahres-Finanzplans (LRP) in Zusammenarbeit mit der globalen Strategie, der globalen Merchandising- und Betriebsplanung sowie dem Produkt. Verständnis der Markenstrategie und Unterstützung der Umsetzung durch Finanzanalysen; - Unterstützung bei Ad-hoc-Analysen auf Anfrage des europäischen oder globalen/unternehmensweiten Managements ## Anforderungen Sie sind ein Profi mit nachgewiesener Erfahrung in der Geschäftssteuerung und Finanzplanung, mit einer starken analytischen Denkweise und: - Abschluss in einem Finanzbereich (Buchhaltung, Controlling) und vorzugsweise 1/2 Jahre Berufserfahrung; - Fundierte Software- und PC-Kenntnisse (Fortgeschritten in Excel, PowerPoint, SAP/COGNOS, Erfahrung mit BPC ist ein Plus); - Hervorragendes Zeitmanagement und Priorisierungsfähigkeiten mit der Fähigkeit, enge Fristen einzuhalten; - Sehr gute Englischkenntnisse (schriftlich und mündlich); - Nachgewiesene Kommunikationsfähigkeiten im Umgang mit Personen ohne Finanzhintergrund; - Hervorragende organisatorische und ergebnisorientierte Fähigkeiten ## Was wir bieten Wir sind im Geschäft, um das menschliche Potenzial zu entfalten, angetrieben von den Ideen, der Energie und dem Engagement unserer Mitarbeiter. Deshalb bieten wir umfassende Vorteile, die die mentale, körperliche und finanzielle Gesundheit aller VF-Mitarbeiter fördern. Wenn es um Vorteile geht, sind wir das Rundum-Paket. - Eine unterstützende Feedback-Kultur, in der Respekt und Integrität unser Handeln leiten; - Eine inklusive internationale Umgebung, in der Menschen aus verschiedenen Hintergründen, Lebensstilen und Nationalitäten gerne zusammenarbeiten; - Teilnahme an einer ikonischen Lifestyle-Marke in einer Multi-Brand- und multinationalen Organisation; - Vor-Ort-Fitnessstudio mit Gesundheits- und Wellnessinitiativen; - Rabattkarte mit 50 % auf alle VF-Marken; - Pausenbereiche mit kostenlosen Heißgetränken ## Kontakt R-20260323-0032
descriptionByLocale.fr: FP&A Analyst, Shared Functions VF Corporation recherche un(e) Analyste FP&A exceptionnel(le), Shared Functions, pour rejoindre notre équipe Finance basée à Stabio, Suisse. Parlons du rôle ! En tant qu'Analyste FP&A, vous soutiendrez les activités de FP&A liées à la planification et aux prévisions du P&L en vous concentrant sur les ventes et les marges du canal de gros, jouant un rôle clé dans la création d'un alignement autour du Gross-To-Net, en analysant les dynamiques et les performances principales du canal et des comptes, ainsi qu'en aidant la marque à prendre les bonnes décisions pour maximiser la rentabilité. Vous collecterez des données de prévision et de planification, qui devront être chargées dans l'outil de reporting (BPC), et fournirez des rapports, comme déterminé par les responsables de secteur et la direction senior. Pour atteindre les objectifs du département, vous travaillerez en étroite collaboration avec vos collègues du département Finance ainsi qu'avec d'autres fonctions telles que DTC, Planification, Ventes et vous rapporterez directement au Directeur, FP&A. Nous attendons de vous que vous obteniez des résultats exceptionnels tout en remplissant les aspects suivants du rôle d'Analyste FP&A : - Gérer et maintenir les outils de planification et de prévision financière GTN et assurer la cohérence et l'exactitude des données saisies dans les systèmes ; - S'assurer que les chiffres actuels sont alignés sur les attentes et analyser et signaler de manière proactive les écarts par rapport aux prévisions ; - Maintenir un alignement continu entre le GTN financier et commercial pour garantir l'équilibre entre les objectifs de vente, de marge et d'inventaire ; - Fournir une précision exceptionnelle des prévisions et analyser de manière proactive toute tendance ou dynamique critique au sein des principaux canaux et comptes ; - S'assurer que toutes les demandes récurrentes liées aux prévisions et aux plans sont livrées avec précision et dans les délais : détails des ouvertures de magasins, détails des comptes clés, analyses des revenus, ponts de marge, aperçus des catégories, etc. ; - Soutenir le plan financier à 5 ans (LRP) en partenariat avec la stratégie mondiale, la planification mondiale du merchandising & Ops et le produit. Comprendre la stratégie de la marque et soutenir sa réalisation grâce à l'analyse financière ; - Aider à l'analyse ad hoc à la demande de la direction européenne ou mondiale/corporate ## Exigences Vous êtes un(e) professionnel(le) avec une expérience avérée en contrôle de gestion et en planification financière, avec un esprit analytique fort et : - Diplôme dans un domaine financier (comptabilité, contrôle) et 1/2 ans d'expérience professionnelle souhaitée ; - Solides compétences en logiciels et en informatique (niveau avancé en Excel, PowerPoint, SAP/COGNOS, expérience avec BPC est un atout) ; - Excellente gestion du temps et capacité à prioriser tout en respectant des délais serrés ; - Excellente maîtrise de l'anglais (écrit et oral) ; - Compétences avérées en communication pour interagir avec des personnes sans formation financière ; - Excellentes compétences organisationnelles et orientées résultats ## Ce que nous offrons Nous sommes en affaires pour libérer le potentiel humain, guidés par les idées, l'énergie et l'engagement de nos collaborateurs. C'est pourquoi nous offrons des avantages complets qui encouragent la santé mentale, physique et financière de tous les associés VF. En matière d'avantages, nous sommes le package complet. - Une culture de feedback bienveillante où le respect et l'intégrité guident nos actions ; - Un environnement international inclusif où des personnes de différents horizons, modes de vie et nationalités aiment travailler ensemble ; - Participer à une marque de style de vie emblématique au sein d'une organisation multimarques et multinationale ; - Salle de sport sur place proposant des initiatives de santé et de bien-être ; - Carte de réduction de 50 % sur toutes les marques VF ; - Espaces de pause offrant des boissons chaudes gratuites ## Contact R-20260323-0032

jobs.title: Allocator Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Allocator Intern for Vans. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! We are looking for a Allocator intern to join VANS within VF EMEA Internship Program. In this role, you will provide support to the Allocation Team: - By taking an active role in analysing performance and sales trend. - Monitoring deliveries, maintaining adequate stock levels. - Taking care of replenishment / initial allocation for O&O EMEA Stores. - Developing and maintaining reports and tools finding the best way to make them efficient and useful for the team. How you will make a difference You should be an analytical, resilient and curious team player, being: - Fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills. - Passionate for numbers with strong analytical skills: accuracy and attention to details is a must. - Proficient in Microsoft Excel. Knowledge of any BI platform will be considered as a plus (eg: Power BI). - Eager to learn and face up new challenges. - Proactive in order to achieve yours and your team goals. - First experiences such as other internships, extracurricular activities, is considered as a plus What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Learn about Vans’ trends and main logics of Retail Merchandising. - Learn logics of inventory management, sales analysis, and allocation strategies. - Learn to work with a wide team of internal stakeholder. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260205-0007

descriptionByLocale.it: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Allocator Intern for Napapijri. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Napapijri is looking for an exceptional Allocator Intern to join our DTC (Direct To Consumer) team based in Stabio, Switzerland. As Allocator Intern you will support the development of our Owned & Operated Outlet and Full Price business. You will collaborate closely with the Merchandise Planner, Buyer, and Sales Team to ensure that inventory is managed to the planned constraints and business goals. You will have a direct impact on the day-by-day life of our teams and being accountable for performance monitoring to support informed decision. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Allocator Intern: - Supports Inventory Plans through the execution of initial seasonal inventory allocations and the weekly/daily replenishment activities - Focus on store & Channels inventory levels - STO (Stock Transfer Order ) Management, Shipping delivery Schedule, Delivery Plans, back to DC management (in season and end of season) arranging pick-up with local couriers - Performance & stock analysis to support planning team - Contribute to historical data analysis, inventory and communication set up and results monitoring during Key Centre activations - Contribute to properly set up promotions in the system - Contribute to keep a constant communication flow with key stakeholders (Field, sales team,..) How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - A University Bachelor or Master’s degree in Economic, Statistic, or related fields is required as a pre-requisite - Strong analytical skills and knowledge. Previous experience in retail planning and/or allocation is preferred. - Advantage knowledge of Microsoft Excel. Ability to create reports that meet business needs and data-visualization dashboards - Ability to analyse, present and communicate information in a manner that allows informed decision-making - Trading mentality: ability to work in team maximising communication between different functions, challenge results and information to identify challenges, drive for results and be profit-focused. - You are fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Consolidation of your analytical skills (improving trading capabilities & performance analysis) - Manage a full allocation process from order creation to stock management - Promotion planning & management (In Season & End of Season) - Work in a dynamic DTC environment with an agile and adaptable team The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260218-0006

jobs.title: Retail Marketing Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Retail Marketing Intern for Vans. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! This internship offers hands-on experiences at the intersection of marketing and retail, where you’ll help shape in-store activations while learning how brand strategy comes to life at the point of sale Support the planning and execution of retail marketing initiatives that enhance in-store visibility, customer engagement, and sales performance. Gain experience analyzing results, coordinating with cross-functional teams, and translating brand strategy into impactful retail activations. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Retail Marketing intern: - Support the planning and execution of retail marketing and in-store activations, helping bring Vans’ brand, culture, and stories to life in stores. - Coordinate with cross-functional teams (Retail, Creative, Visual Merchandising, and other Marketing functions) to gather all tactics needed to deliver engaging in-store events and consumer activations. - Assist with retail marketing operations across EMEA, supporting different store formats (Owned, Partner, Outlet). - Contribute to training and communication materials for store teams ahead of key activations or events. - Help execute retail campaigns and store activations, including in-store visuals, digital retail communications, and event-related materials. - Provide day-to-day support on cross-functional needs, such as copy coordination, translations, and event logistics. - Work closely with DTC (Direct To Consumer) Retail teams (district and store managers) to support smooth execution at store level. - Support the creation of briefs and post-activation recaps, capturing learnings and best practices for future in-store initiatives. - Support basic budget tracking and purchase order follow-up in coordination with the team. Skills that will make you successful You are a natural facilitator who helps ideas turn into real, on-the-ground experiences: - Project-minded and well-organized – You enjoy working in project mode, juggling multiple activations, and coordinating across Creative, Retail, Visual Merchandising, and Marketing teams. - Curious about retail marketing and in-store activations – You’re eager to understand how brand storytelling, consumer experience, and store execution come together in a physical retail environment. - Culturally connected – You have a strong eye for engaging content and a genuine affinity with action sports, street culture, and the Vans DNA (skate, music, art, and self-expression). - Detail-driven yet hands-on – You care about quality, follow through on execution, and take pride in getting the small details right for events and store activations. - Proactive and solution-oriented -You show initiative, adapt quickly, and keep things moving even when plans evolve or challenges arise. - Collaborative by nature – You thrive in team environments, share information openly, and contribute positively to collective success. - Comfortable working with data and tools – You enjoy using tools like Excel and PowerPoint to track projects, support reporting, and tell clear, visual stories. - A Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Marketing, Communication, Business, or a related field is nice to have, but we are most interested in your mindset, curiosity, and relevant experiences. What’s in it for you By joining the Vans Retail Marketing team, you’ll gain real, hands-on experience working on in-store activations and events for an iconic global action sports brand. During your internship, you will: - Work closely with international and cross-functional teams across Retail, Marketing, Creative, and Visual Merchandising. - Contribute to real retail activations and in-store events, from idea to execution. - Learn how brand strategy translates into physical retail experiences that engage consumers. - Receive exposure to retail marketing operations across EMEA, including different store formats. - Benefit from on-the-job learning, mentoring, and collaboration with experienced professionals in the industry. By the end of the internship, you can expect to have a clear understanding of: - How retail marketing and in-store activations are planned, executed, and measured. - How cross-functional teams collaborate to deliver impactful store experiences. - How Vans’ brand values and action-sports culture are expressed at retail level. - The operational side of retail marketing, including asset production, timelines, and budget basics. - What it takes to successfully deliver consumer-facing events in a fast-paced retail environment. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260206-0013

This internship offers hands-on experiences at the intersection of marketing and retail, where you’ll help shape in-store activations while learning how brand strategy comes to life at the point of sale Support the planning and execution of retail marketing initiatives that enhance in-store visibility, customer engagement, and sales performance. Gain experience analyzing results, coordinating with cross-functional teams, and translating brand strategy into impactful retail activations. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Retail Marketing intern: - Support the planning and execution of retail marketing and in-store activations, helping bring Vans’ brand, culture, and stories to life in stores. - Coordinate with cross-functional teams (Retail, Creative, Visual Merchandising, and other Marketing functions) to gather all tactics needed to deliver engaging in-store events and consumer activations. - Assist with retail marketing operations across EMEA, supporting different store formats (Owned, Partner, Outlet). - Contribute to training and communication materials for store teams ahead of key activations or events. - Help execute retail campaigns and store activations, including in-store visuals, digital retail communications, and event-related materials. - Provide day-to-day support on cross-functional needs, such as copy coordination, translations, and event logistics. - Work closely with DTC (Direct To Consumer) Retail teams (district and store managers) to support smooth execution at store level. - Support the creation of briefs and post-activation recaps, capturing learnings and best practices for future in-store initiatives. - Support basic budget tracking and purchase order follow-up in coordination with the team. Skills that will make you successful You are a natural facilitator who helps ideas turn into real, on-the-ground experiences: - Project-minded and well-organized – You enjoy working in project mode, juggling multiple activations, and coordinating across Creative, Retail, Visual Merchandising, and Marketing teams. - Curious about retail marketing and in-store activations – You’re eager to understand how brand storytelling, consumer experience, and store execution come together in a physical retail environment. - Culturally connected – You have a strong eye for engaging content and a genuine affinity with action sports, street culture, and the Vans DNA (skate, music, art, and self-expression). - Detail-driven yet hands-on – You care about quality, follow through on execution, and take pride in getting the small details right for events and store activations. - Proactive and solution-oriented -You show initiative, adapt quickly, and keep things moving even when plans evolve or challenges arise. - Collaborative by nature – You thrive in team environments, share information openly, and contribute positively to collective success. - Comfortable working with data and tools – You enjoy using tools like Excel and PowerPoint to track projects, support reporting, and tell clear, visual stories. - A Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Marketing, Communication, Business, or a related field is nice to have, but we are most interested in your mindset, curiosity, and relevant experiences. What’s in it for you By joining the Vans Retail Marketing team, you’ll gain real, hands-on experience working on in-store activations and events for an iconic global action sports brand. During your internship, you will: - Work closely with international and cross-functional teams across Retail, Marketing, Creative, and Visual Merchandising. - Contribute to real retail activations and in-store events, from idea to execution. - Learn how brand strategy translates into physical retail experiences that engage consumers. - Receive exposure to retail marketing operations across EMEA, including different store formats. - Benefit from on-the-job learning, mentoring, and collaboration with experienced professionals in the industry. By the end of the internship, you can expect to have a clear understanding of: - How retail marketing and in-store activations are planned, executed, and measured. - How cross-functional teams collaborate to deliver impactful store experiences. - How Vans’ brand values and action-sports culture are expressed at retail level. - The operational side of retail marketing, including asset production, timelines, and budget basics. - What it takes to successfully deliver consumer-facing events in a fast-paced retail environment. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260206-0013

jobs.title: CRM & Loyalty Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as CRM & Loyalty Intern for Vans. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Vans is looking for a curious and driven CRM & Loyalty Intern to support how we engage, reward, and grow our consumer community across EMEA, based in Stabio, Switzerland. Support the execution of Vans’ CRM and Loyalty strategy across EMEA, contributing to how we engage our community, strengthen loyalty, and bring the Vans brand to life through meaningful, data‑driven consumer experiences. You will gain hands‑on exposure to lifecycle marketing, loyalty mechanics, and cross‑functional collaboration within a global, youth‑culture‑driven brand. - Support the execution of CRM campaigns across email, eCommerce, and other consumer touchpoints, ensuring brand consistency and flawless delivery - Contribute to the setup, monitoring, and optimization of loyalty activations to drive engagement, retention, and member value - Manage and update CRM assets such as campaign calendars, briefs, tracking files, and dashboards to support day‑to‑day execution - Be responsible for supporting reporting and post‑campaign analysis, helping translate consumer and performance data into clear insights - Develop a strong understanding of the Vans consumer, community mindset, and lifecycle stages by working closely with EMEA and Central teams - Support additional ad-hoc digital media initiatives and projects as part of the wider Vans Brand Planning team How you will make a difference What will make you successful in this role: - A strong passion for the Vans brand, youth culture, and community‑driven marketing, with curiosity about how brands build long‑term relationships - A genuine interest in CRM, loyalty programs, and data‑informed decision‑making, beyond just campaign execution - An analytical mindset, with the ability to connect performance data to consumer behavior and brand impact - High attention to detail and structure, essential for managing multiple campaigns and stakeholders in parallel - A proactive, hands‑on attitude, comfortable working in a fast‑moving, international environment and learning by doing - A degree in Marketing, Business, Economics, Data, or a related field is nice to have What’s in it for you In the role of CRM & Loyalty Intern , you will work at the heart of Vans’ consumer engagement strategy, gaining hands‑on experience in how a global youth‑culture brand builds long‑term relationships with its community. By joining our team, you will: - Gain practical experience in CRM, loyalty, and lifecycle marketing , working on real campaigns that reach millions of consumers across EMEA - Learn how to translate consumer data and insights into meaningful actions that drive engagement, retention, and brand love - Develop a strong understanding of Vans Family , loyalty mechanics, and how community‑driven brands create value beyond transactions - Work closely with an international, cross‑functional team , collaborating with Brand, Digital, eCommerce, and Central CRM teams - Build confidence using industry‑leading tools and processes , with exposure to campaign execution, reporting, and performance optimization - Benefit from a supportive learning environment, including on‑the‑job coaching, feedback, and networking opportunities across teams and brands within VF This internship is a unique opportunity to learn by doing, grow your skill set, and contribute to shaping how Vans connects with its community — always "Off The Wall". The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260206-0012
