By joining our team, you will: - Gain practical experience in CRM, loyalty, and lifecycle marketing , working on real campaigns that reach millions of consumers across EMEA - Learn how to translate consumer data and insights into meaningful actions that drive engagement, retention, and brand love - Develop a strong understanding of Vans Family , loyalty mechanics, and how community‑driven brands create value beyond transactions - Work closely with an international, cross‑functional team , collaborating with Brand, Digital, eCommerce, and Central CRM teams - Build confidence using industry‑leading tools and processes , with exposure to campaign execution, reporting, and performance optimization - Benefit from a supportive learning environment, including on‑the‑job coaching, feedback, and networking opportunities across teams and brands within VF ## Contatto This internship is a unique opportunity to learn by doing, grow your skill set, and contribute to shaping how Vans connects with its community — always "Off The Wall". The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260206-0012
descriptionByLocale.it: #VFInternshipProgram Sii un sognatore, fai la differenza! Unisciti al #VFInternshipProgram nel nostro quartier generale EMEA a Stabio, in Svizzera, come CRM e Loyalty Intern per Vans. ## Descrizione Informazioni su VF VF sta ridefinendo il significato di essere la migliore azienda di abbigliamento, calzature e attrezzature al mondo, alimentando marchi iconici di stile di vita attivo tra cui The North Face®, Vans® e Timberland®. Scopri di più su http://vfc.com. ### Chiavi informazioni - Data di inizio: 1 giugno 2026 - Durata: 12 mesi, a tempo pieno - Stipendio mensile lordo: 1'850 CHF - Sede: VF EMEA Headquarters a Stabio, Svizzera - Processo di reclutamento semplificato: 3 colloqui (reclutatore, responsabile delle assunzioni, potenziale business case) ### Requisiti di elegibilità - Devi laurearti dopo il 1 maggio 2026 OPPURE devi avere un status di studente a partire da giugno 2026 - È necessario possedere la cittadinanza UE o SEE (Spazio economico europeo) ## Il ruolo Vans è alla ricerca di uno stagista CRM e fidelizzazione curioso e motivato per supportare il modo in cui coinvolgiamo, premiamo e facciamo crescere la nostra comunità di consumatori in tutta l'area EMEA, con sede a Stabio, Svizzera. - Supportare l'attuazione della strategia CRM e fidelizzazione di Vans in tutta l'area EMEA, contribuendo al modo in cui coinvolgiamo la nostra comunità, rafforziamo la fidelizzazione e diamo vita al marchio Vans attraverso esperienze di consumo significative e basate sui dati. - Otterrai un'esposizione pratica al marketing del ciclo di vita, ai meccanismi di fidelizzazione e alla collaborazione interfunzionale all'interno di un marchio globale guidato dalla cultura giovanile. ### Compiti e responsabilità - Supportare l'esecuzione di campagne CRM attraverso e-mail, eCommerce e altri punti di contatto con i consumatori, garantendo coerenza del marchio e consegna impeccabile - Contribuire all'impostazione, al monitoraggio e all'ottimizzazione delle attivazioni di fidelizzazione per favorire il coinvolgimento, la fidelizzazione e il valore dei membri - Gestire e aggiornare le risorse CRM come calendari delle campagne, brief, file di monitoraggio e dashboard per supportare l'esecuzione quotidiana - Essere responsabile del supporto del reporting e dell'analisi post-campagna, aiutando a tradurre i dati sui consumatori e sulle prestazioni in informazioni chiare - Sviluppare una profonda comprensione del consumatore Vans, della mentalità della comunità e delle fasi del ciclo di vita lavorando a stretto contatto con i team EMEA e centrali - Supportare ulteriori iniziative e progetti ad hoc sui media digitali come parte del più ampio team Vans Brand Planning ## Come farai la differenza Cosa ti renderà di successo in questo ruolo: - Una forte passione per il marchio Vans, la cultura giovanile e il marketing orientato alla comunità, con curiosità su come i marchi costruiscono relazioni a lungo termine - Un genuino interesse per il CRM, i programmi fedeltà e il processo decisionale basato sui dati, oltre la semplice campagna esecuzione - Una mentalità analitica, con la capacità di collegare i dati sulle prestazioni al comportamento dei consumatori e all'impatto del marchio - Elevata attenzione ai dettagli e alla struttura, essenziali per gestire più campagne e stakeholder in parallelo - Un atteggiamento proattivo e pratico, lavorare a proprio agio in un ambiente internazionale in rapida evoluzione e imparare facendo - Una laurea in Marketing, Business, Economia, Dati o un campo correlato è bello avere ## Cosa offerta Nel ruolo di CRM & Loyalty Intern, lavorerai al centro della strategia di coinvolgimento dei consumatori di Vans, guadagnando esperienza pratica su come un marchio globale di cultura giovanile costruisce relazioni a lungo termine con la sua comunità. Unendoti al nostro team, potrai: - Acquisire esperienza pratica nel CRM, nella fidelizzazione e nel marketing del ciclo di vita, lavorando su campagne reali che raggiungono milioni di consumatori in tutta l'area EMEA - Imparare a tradurre i dati e le informazioni sui consumatori in azioni significative che stimolano il coinvolgimento, la fidelizzazione e l'amore per il marchio - Sviluppare una profonda comprensione della famiglia Vans, dei meccanismi di fidelizzazione e di come i marchi guidati dalla comunità creano valore al di là delle transazioni - Lavorerai a stretto contatto con un team internazionale e interfunzionale, collaborando con i team Brand, Digital, eCommerce e CRM centrale - Costruirai fiducia nell'utilizzo di strumenti e processi leader del settore, con esposizione all'esecuzione delle campagne, al reporting e all'ottimizzazione delle prestazioni - Approfitta di un ambiente di apprendimento favorevole, che include coaching sul lavoro, feedback e opportunità di networking tra team e marchi all'interno di VF ## Contatto Questo stage è un'opportunità unica per imparare facendo, accrescere le tue competenze e contribuire a plasmare il modo in cui Vans si connette con la sua comunità, sempre "Off The Wall". Il programma di stage VF EMEA è un viaggio di 12 mesi progettato per sviluppare e potenziare i talenti emergenti all'inizio della loro carriera. Ci impegniamo a liberare il tuo potenziale, quindi puoi aspettarti un percorso di apprendimento strutturato e una ricca esperienza pratica, tra cui: - Workshop dedicati allo sviluppo delle competenze e progetti di gruppo di consulenza interna - Una giornata di lavoro in negozio per acquisire informazioni reali sui nostri marchi - Opportunità di networking con colleghi e leadership senior Non possiamo garantire che lo stage ti porterà successivamente a un contratto, ma grazie al valore dell'esperienza la maggior parte dei nostri stagisti rimane in azienda dopo il periodo di stage. Poiché vogliamo che tu ti concentri su ciò che conta, offriamo vantaggi completi che incoraggiano il benessere mentale, fisico e finanziario. Potrai usufruire di: - Politica di lavoro ibrido - Sconto del 50% sui marchi VF - Palestra in loco, che offre iniziative per la salute e il benessere - Mensa sovvenzionata e aree relax che offrono bevande gratuite - Bus navetta per l'ufficio o sconto sui trasporti pubblici, a seconda della posizione - Una fiorente comunità di stagisti, con persone di diversa provenienza, stile di vita e nazionalità che amano lavorare insieme. Libertà di essere, inclusione e appartenenza In qualità di datore di lavoro per le pari opportunità, ci impegniamo a promuovere una cultura di appartenenza basata sul rispetto, la connessione, l'apertura e l'autenticità. Ci impegniamo a costruire e mantenere un ambiente di lavoro che celebri la diversità dei nostri dipendenti, consentendo loro di portare il loro sé autentico al lavoro ogni giorno. Ci sei? Candidati ora: la domanda anticipata aumenta le tue possibilità! #prontiperapplicareR-20260206-0012
descriptionByLocale.de: #VFInternshipProgram Seien Sie ein Träumer, machen Sie den Unterschied! Nehmen Sie am #VFInternshipProgram in unserem EMEA-Hauptsitz in Stabio, Schweiz, als CRM- und Loyalty-Praktikant für Vans teil. ## Beschreibung Über VF VF definiert neu, was es bedeutet, das weltbeste Bekleidungs-, Schuh- und Ausrüstungsunternehmen zu sein, und unterstützt ikonische aktive Lifestyle-Marken wie The North Face®, Vans® und Timberland®. Erfahren Sie mehr unter http://vfc.com. ### Wichtige Informationen – Startdatum: 1. Juni 2026 – Dauer: 12 Monate, Vollzeit – Bruttomonatsgehalt: 1.850 CHF – Standort: VF EMEA-Hauptsitz in Stabio, Schweiz – Optimierter Rekrutierungsprozess: 3 Vorstellungsgespräche (Personalvermittler, Einstellungsmanager, potenzieller Business Case) ### Elegibilitätsvoraussetzungen – Sie müssen nach dem 1. Mai Ihren Abschluss machen, 2026 ODER Sie müssen ab Juni 2026 einen Studentenstatus haben – Sie müssen die Staatsbürgerschaft der EU oder des EWR (Europäischer Wirtschaftsraum) besitzen ## Il ruolo Vans ist auf der Suche nach einem neugierigen und engagierten CRM- und Loyalty-Praktikanten, der uns dabei unterstützt, wie wir unsere Verbrauchergemeinschaft in der gesamten EMEA-Region einbinden, belohnen und ausbauen, mit Sitz in Stabio, Schweiz. - Unterstützen Sie die Umsetzung der CRM- und Loyalitätsstrategie von Vans in der gesamten EMEA-Region und tragen Sie dazu bei, wie wir unsere Community einbeziehen, die Loyalität stärken und die Marke Vans durch aussagekräftige, datengesteuerte Kundenerlebnisse zum Leben erwecken. - Sie erhalten praktische Einblicke in Lifecycle-Marketing, Loyalitätsmechanismen und funktionsübergreifende Zusammenarbeit innerhalb einer globalen, von der Jugendkultur geprägten Marke. ### Compiti e responsabilità – Unterstützen Sie die Ausführung von CRM-Kampagnen über E-Mail, E-Commerce und andere Verbraucherkontaktpunkte und stellen Sie Markenkonsistenz und einwandfreie Lieferung sicher. – Tragen Sie zur Einrichtung, Überwachung und Optimierung von Treueaktivierungen bei, um Engagement, Bindung und Mitgliederwert zu steigern. – Verwalten und aktualisieren Sie CRM-Assets wie Kampagnenkalender, Briefings, Tracking-Dateien und Dashboards, um die tägliche Ausführung zu unterstützen. – Übernehmen Sie die Verantwortung für die Unterstützung von Berichten und Post-Kampagnen-Analysen und helfen Sie bei der Umsetzung von Verbraucher- und Leistungsdaten Klare Einblicke – Entwickeln Sie ein starkes Verständnis für die Vans-Verbraucher-, Community-Denkweise und Lebenszyklusphasen durch enge Zusammenarbeit mit EMEA- und Zentralteams – Unterstützen Sie zusätzliche Ad-hoc-Initiativen und Projekte für digitale Medien als Teil des breiteren Vans-Markenplanungsteams ## Come farai la differenza Was macht Sie in dieser Rolle erfolgreich: – Eine starke Leidenschaft für die Marke Vans, die Jugendkultur und das Community-gesteuerte Marketing, mit Neugier darauf, wie Marken langfristige Beziehungen aufbauen – Ein echtes Interesse an CRM, Treueprogrammen usw datengestützte Entscheidungsfindung, die über die bloße Kampagnenausführung hinausgeht – Eine analytische Denkweise mit der Fähigkeit, Leistungsdaten mit Verbraucherverhalten und Markenwirkung zu verknüpfen – Hohe Liebe zum Detail und zur Struktur, unerlässlich für die parallele Verwaltung mehrerer Kampagnen und Stakeholder – Eine proaktive, praktische Einstellung, angenehmes Arbeiten in einem schnelllebigen, internationalen Umfeld und Learning by Doing – Ein Abschluss in Marketing, Betriebswirtschaft, Wirtschaftswissenschaften, Daten oder einem verwandten Bereich ist schön zu haben ## Cosa offriamo In der Rolle des CRM & Loyalty Praktikanten werden Sie das tun Arbeiten Sie im Mittelpunkt der Verbraucherengagement-Strategie von Vans und sammeln Sie praktische Erfahrungen damit, wie eine globale Jugendkulturmarke langfristige Beziehungen zu ihrer Community aufbaut. Wenn Sie unserem Team beitreten, werden Sie: - praktische Erfahrungen in den Bereichen CRM, Loyalität und Lifecycle-Marketing sammeln und an echten Kampagnen arbeiten, die Millionen von Verbrauchern in der gesamten EMEA-Region erreichen. - Erfahren Sie, wie Sie Verbraucherdaten und Erkenntnisse in sinnvolle Maßnahmen umsetzen, die Engagement, Kundenbindung und Markenliebe fördern. - Ein tiefes Verständnis für die Vans-Familie, Loyalitätsmechanismen und die Art und Weise entwickeln, wie Community-gesteuerte Marken über Transaktionen hinaus Werte schaffen. - Eng mit einem internationalen, funktionsübergreifenden Team zusammenarbeiten, das mit Marken-, Digital-, E-Commerce- und zentralen CRM-Teams zusammenarbeitet. - Aufbau Vertrauen in den Einsatz branchenführender Tools und Prozesse, mit Einblick in Kampagnenausführung, Berichterstattung und Leistungsoptimierung – Profitieren Sie von einer unterstützenden Lernumgebung, einschließlich Coaching am Arbeitsplatz, Feedback und Networking-Möglichkeiten über Teams und Marken hinweg innerhalb von VF ## Contatto Dieses Praktikum ist eine einzigartige Gelegenheit, durch praktisches Lernen zu lernen, Ihre Fähigkeiten zu erweitern und dazu beizutragen, die Art und Weise zu gestalten, wie Vans mit seiner Community in Kontakt tritt – immer „Off The Wall“. Das VF EMEA-Praktikumsprogramm ist eine 12-monatige Reise, die darauf abzielt, aufstrebende Talente zu Beginn ihrer Karriere zu fördern und zu stärken. Wir sind bestrebt, Ihr Potenzial freizusetzen, sodass Sie einen strukturierten Lernpfad und umfangreiche praktische Erfahrungen erwarten können, einschließlich: - Spezielle Workshops zum Aufbau von Fähigkeiten und internes Beratungsgruppenprojekt - Ein Arbeitstag im Geschäft, um echte Einblicke in unsere Marken zu gewinnen - Networking-Möglichkeiten mit Kollegen und Führungskräften Wir können nicht garantieren, dass das Praktikum Sie anschließend zu einem Vertrag führt, aber dank des Werts der Erfahrung bleiben die meisten unserer Praktikanten nach der Praktikumszeit im Unternehmen. Da wir möchten, dass Sie sich auf das Wesentliche konzentrieren können, bieten wir umfassende Leistungen, die das geistige, körperliche und finanzielle Wohlbefinden fördern. Sie werden Folgendes genießen: - Hybride Arbeitspolitik - 50 % Rabatt auf VF-Marken - Fitnessstudio vor Ort mit Gesundheits- und Wohlfühlinitiativen - Subventionierte Kantine sowie Pausenbereiche mit kostenlosen Getränken - Shuttlebus zum Büro oder Ermäßigung auf öffentliche Verkehrsmittel, je nach Standort - Eine lebendige Praktikantengemeinschaft mit Menschen unterschiedlicher Herkunft, Lebensstil und Nationalität, die gerne zusammenarbeiten. Frei sein, Inklusion und Zugehörigkeit Als Arbeitgeber, der Chancengleichheit bietet, streben wir danach, eine Kultur der Zugehörigkeit zu fördern, die auf Respekt, Verbundenheit, Offenheit und Authentizität basiert. Wir engagieren uns für den Aufbau und Erhalt eines Arbeitsplatzes, der die Vielfalt unserer Mitarbeiter würdigt und es ihnen ermöglicht, jeden Tag ihr authentisches Selbst bei der Arbeit einzubringen. Bist du dabei? Bewerben Sie sich jetzt – eine frühzeitige Bewerbung erhöht Ihre Chancen! #readytoapply R-20260206-0012
descriptionByLocale.fr: #VFInternshipProgram Soyez un rêveur, faites la différence ! Rejoignez le #VFInternshipProgram dans notre siège EMEA à Stabio, en Suisse, en tant que stagiaire CRM et fidélisation pour Vans. ## Descrizione À propos de VF VF redéfinit ce que signifie être la meilleure entreprise de vêtements, de chaussures et d'équipement au monde, en soutenant des marques emblématiques de style de vie actif, notamment The North Face®, Vans® et Timberland®. Apprenez-en davantage sur http://vfc.com. ### Chiave informazioni - Date de début : 1er juin 2026 - Durée : 12 mois, temps plein - Salaire mensuel brut : 1'850 CHF - Lieu : Siège social de VF EMEA à Stabio, Suisse - Processus de recrutement rationalisé : 3 entretiens (Recruteur, Hiring Manager, potentiel Business Case) ### Requisiti di elegibilità - Vous devez être diplômé après le 1er mai 2026 OU vous doit avoir un statut d'étudiant à partir de juin 2026 - Vous devez détenir la citoyenneté de l'UE ou de l'EEE (Espace économique européen) ## Il ruolo Vans recherche un stagiaire CRM et fidélisation curieux et motivé pour nous aider à engager, récompenser et développer notre communauté de consommateurs dans la région EMEA, basé à Stabio, en Suisse. - Soutenir l'exécution de la stratégie CRM et de fidélisation de Vans dans la région EMEA, en contribuant à la façon dont nous engageons notre communauté, renforçons la fidélité et donnons vie à la marque Vans grâce à des expériences de consommation significatives et basées sur les données. - Vous obtiendrez une exposition pratique au marketing du cycle de vie, aux mécanismes de fidélisation et à la collaboration interfonctionnelle au sein d'une marque mondiale axée sur la culture des jeunes. ### Compiti e responsabilità - Soutenir l'exécution de campagnes CRM par courrier électronique, e-commerce et autres points de contact avec les consommateurs, garantissant la cohérence de la marque et une livraison impeccable - Contribuer à la configuration, au suivi et à l'optimisation des activations de fidélisation pour stimuler l'engagement, la fidélisation et la valeur des membres - Gérer et mettre à jour les actifs CRM tels que les calendriers de campagne, les briefs, les fichiers de suivi et les tableaux de bord pour prendre en charge l'exécution quotidienne - Être responsable de la prise en charge des rapports et de l'analyse post-campagne, en aidant à traduire les données sur les consommateurs et les performances en termes clairs - Développer une solide compréhension de l'état d'esprit du consommateur Vans, de la mentalité de la communauté et des étapes du cycle de vie en travaillant en étroite collaboration avec les équipes EMEA et centrales - Soutenir d'autres initiatives et projets de médias numériques ad hoc au sein de l'équipe plus large de planification de la marque Vans ## Come farai la differenza Ce qui vous fera réussir dans ce rôle : - Une forte passion pour la marque Vans, la culture des jeunes et le marketing communautaire, avec une curiosité pour la façon dont les marques construisent des relations à long terme - Un réel intérêt pour le CRM, les programmes de fidélisation et la prise de décision éclairée par les données, au-delà de la simple exécution de campagnes - Un esprit analytique, avec la capacité de relier les données de performance au comportement des consommateurs et à l'impact de la marque - Une grande attention aux détails et à la structure, essentielle pour gérer plusieurs campagnes et parties prenantes en parallèle - Une attitude proactive et pratique, à l'aise de travailler dans un environnement international en évolution rapide et d'apprendre par la pratique - Un diplôme en marketing, commerce, économie, données ou dans un domaine connexe est agréable à avoir ## Cosa offriamo Dans le rôle de CRM & Loyalty Stagiaire, vous travaillerez au cœur du consommateur de Vans stratégie d’engagement, acquérant une expérience pratique de la manière dont une marque mondiale de culture jeunesse construit des relations à long terme avec sa communauté. En rejoignant notre équipe, vous : - Acquerrez une expérience pratique en matière de CRM, de fidélisation et de marketing du cycle de vie, en travaillant sur des campagnes réelles qui touchent des millions de consommateurs dans la région EMEA. - Apprenez à traduire les données et les informations des consommateurs en actions significatives qui stimulent l'engagement, la fidélisation et l'amour de la marque. - Développez une solide compréhension de la famille Vans, des mécanismes de fidélisation et de la manière dont les marques communautaires créent de la valeur au-delà des transactions. outils et processus de pointe, avec une exposition à l'exécution de campagnes, au reporting et à l'optimisation des performances - Bénéficiez d'un environnement d'apprentissage favorable, y compris un coaching sur le terrain, des commentaires et des opportunités de réseautage entre les équipes et les marques au sein de VF ## Contatto Ce stage est une opportunité unique d'apprendre par la pratique, de développer vos compétences et de contribuer à façonner la manière dont Vans se connecte avec sa communauté - toujours "Off The Wall". Le programme de stages VF EMEA est un voyage de 12 mois conçu pour développer et responsabiliser les talents émergents au début de leur carrière. Nous nous engageons à libérer votre potentiel, vous pouvez donc vous attendre à un parcours d'apprentissage structuré et à une riche expérience pratique, comprenant : - Des ateliers dédiés de développement des compétences et un projet de groupe de conseil interne - Une journée de travail en magasin pour acquérir de véritables connaissances sur nos marques - Des opportunités de réseautage avec des pairs et la haute direction Nous ne pouvons pas garantir que le stage vous mènera à un contrat par la suite, mais grâce à la valeur de l'expérience, la plupart de nos stagiaires restent dans l'entreprise après la période de stage. Puisque nous souhaitons que vous vous concentriez sur ce qui compte, nous proposons des avantages complets qui favorisent le bien-être mental, physique et financier. Vous bénéficierez de : - Une politique de travail hybride - 50 % de réduction sur les marques VF - Une salle de sport sur place proposant des initiatives santé et bien-être - Une cantine subventionnée, ainsi que des espaces de détente proposant des boissons gratuites - Une navette pour le bureau ou une réduction sur les transports en commun, selon votre localisation - Une communauté de stagiaires florissante, avec des personnes d'horizons, de modes de vie et de nationalités divers qui aiment travailler ensemble. Libre d'être, inclusion et appartenance En tant qu'employeur garantissant l'égalité des chances, nous nous efforçons de favoriser une culture d'appartenance basée sur le respect, la connexion, l'ouverture et l'authenticité. Nous nous engageons à créer et à maintenir un lieu de travail qui célèbre la diversité de nos associés, leur permettant d'apporter leur authenticité au travail chaque jour. Êtes-vous partant ? Postulez maintenant – une candidature anticipée augmente vos chances ! #prêtàpostuler R-20260206-0012

jobs.title: Marketplace Analyst Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as a Marketplace Analyst Intern for The North Face. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! From raw data to real impact. Blend analytics with commercial input to surface opportunities across channels, partners, and products. Analyse complex marketplace and product data to surface clear, actionable insights that inform channel, customer, and assortment decisions. Collaborate with commercial teams to enrich analytics with on‑the‑ground feedback and build Power BI/Excel dashboards that communicate performance and opportunities. How you will make a difference - Structure messy data into reliable assets : clean, join, and model large marketplace datasets with documented, reproducible pipelines (Power Query, Power BI, basic DAX), applying robust data‑quality checks. - Design decision‑ready dashboards : define clear KPIs, choose the right visuals, and build intuitive filters/interactions in Power BI/Excel, with lightweight automation for timely refresh. - Tell insight‑led stories : distil complex analysis into crisp narratives and actionable recommendations (drivers, risks, next steps) tailored to the audience. - Spot patterns in noise : identify trends, seasonality, and outliers; propose targeted deep‑dives or tests to validate root causes and opportunities. - Learn fast, collaborate faster : rapidly upskill on Power BI/Excel features (DAX, Power Query, measures), convert stakeholder feedback into data requirements, and bring curiosity and a passion for the outdoor consumer into the work. Skills that will make you succeed: - Comfortable with numbers and data‑driven thinking a natural feel for patterns, proportions, and trends, and the curiosity to question assumptions. - Fluent in English and effective across levels adapt your style to collaborate with peers and engage management with clarity and respect. - Operate with rigor and ownership document assumptions, apply simple quality checks, respect governance/privacy, and proactively flag risks. - Proficiency in Excel, Power BI, and PowerPoint is welcomed; willingness and ability to become proficient quickly is essential. What’s in it for you Join a young, active, outdoor‑enthusiast team and learn the market status, brand positioning, competitor landscape, performance drivers, and product stories behind The North Face across channels and key accounts. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - D edicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - O ne day of work in-store g ain ing real insight s about our brands - N etworking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? jobs.title: Product Merchandising Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Product Merchandising Intern for The North Face . About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! As a Product Merchandising Intern you will support the end-to-end product lifecycle by translating market insights into compelling assortments that drive sales and brand growth. Collaborate cross-functionally to ensure the right product is in the right place at the right time, maximizing customer impact and business performance. - Support the SMU (Special Make Up) line planning process by analyzing consumer insights, sales performance, and market trends to inform the FW/SS assortment strategy for Europe. - Coordinate the go-to-market process by managing timelines, tools, and product data accuracy to ensure seamless cross-functional alignment. - Monitor in-season product performance to identify risks and opportunities, providing actionable recommendations to optimize sell-through and margin. - Collaborate with global and regional teams to ensure correct data flows into the systems & assortments reflect brand direction while meeting local market needs and commercial goals. - Contribute to visual line reviews and product presentations by supporting the preparation of compelling tools. - Support data entry of PLM (Product Lifecycle Management) systems, support with transfer from PLM to Flex and update linelists to reflect correct information How you will make a difference To succeed as an Associate Product Merchandising Intern, you should be curious about products, eager to learn how assortments are built, and ready to support a fast-paced team with energy and precision. We are looking for someone who has demonstrated: - The ability to work with numbers and draw simple conclusions to support product decisions. - The capability to stay organized and manage multiple tasks with attention to detail. - A team player. Working x functionally is essential as a assistant product merchandiser. - An understanding of what makes a product appealing to consumers , especially in the European market. - Eye for detail to ensure accuracy across the tools & PLM systems - A basic knowledge of Excel or similar tools to help with data and product tracking. - A keen interest in fashion, retail, or product creation , and a desire to grow in this field. - A positive, can-do attitude , and a willingness to support the team wherever needed. What’s in it For You By joining our team, you will: - Learn how to build and manage a seasonal product line , from concept to market launch. - Gain exposure to real-time business decisions , using data to support product and commercial strategies. - Understand the role of merchandising within a global brand , and how it connects with marketing, sales, and product teams. - Develop your analytical and storytelling skills , turning numbers into product narratives. - Build a strong professional network , with opportunities to connect across teams, functions, and brands. - Receive mentorship and training , helping you grow your confidence and capabilities in a dynamic, international environment. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership In this internship, you’ll gain hands-on experience in how seasonal assortments are built and brought to life across the European market. You’ll work closely with experienced merchandisers, gaining exposure to product strategy, consumer insights, and cross-functional collaboration. We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260209-0020

descriptionByLocale.de: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Product Merchandising Intern for The North Face . About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! As a Product Merchandising Intern you will support the end-to-end product lifecycle by translating market insights into compelling assortments that drive sales and brand growth. Collaborate cross-functionally to ensure the right product is in the right place at the right time, maximizing customer impact and business performance. - Support the SMU (Special Make Up) line planning process by analyzing consumer insights, sales performance, and market trends to inform the FW/SS assortment strategy for Europe. - Coordinate the go-to-market process by managing timelines, tools, and product data accuracy to ensure seamless cross-functional alignment. - Monitor in-season product performance to identify risks and opportunities, providing actionable recommendations to optimize sell-through and margin. - Collaborate with global and regional teams to ensure correct data flows into the systems & assortments reflect brand direction while meeting local market needs and commercial goals. - Contribute to visual line reviews and product presentations by supporting the preparation of compelling tools. - Support data entry of PLM (Product Lifecycle Management) systems, support with transfer from PLM to Flex and update linelists to reflect correct information How you will make a difference To succeed as an Associate Product Merchandising Intern, you should be curious about products, eager to learn how assortments are built, and ready to support a fast-paced team with energy and precision. We are looking for someone who has demonstrated: - The ability to work with numbers and draw simple conclusions to support product decisions. - The capability to stay organized and manage multiple tasks with attention to detail. - A team player. Working x functionally is essential as a assistant product merchandiser. - An understanding of what makes a product appealing to consumers , especially in the European market. - Eye for detail to ensure accuracy across the tools & PLM systems - A basic knowledge of Excel or similar tools to help with data and product tracking. - A keen interest in fashion, retail, or product creation , and a desire to grow in this field. - A positive, can-do attitude , and a willingness to support the team wherever needed. What’s in it For You By joining our team, you will: - Learn how to build and manage a seasonal product line , from concept to market launch. - Gain exposure to real-time business decisions , using data to support product and commercial strategies. - Understand the role of merchandising within a global brand , and how it connects with marketing, sales, and product teams. - Develop your analytical and storytelling skills , turning numbers into product narratives. - Build a strong professional network , with opportunities to connect across teams, functions, and brands. - Receive mentorship and training , helping you grow your confidence and capabilities in a dynamic, international environment. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership In this internship, you’ll gain hands-on experience in how seasonal assortments are built and brought to life across the European market. You’ll work closely with experienced merchandisers, gaining exposure to product strategy, consumer insights, and cross-functional collaboration. We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260209-0020

jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Retail Creative Designer Intern for The North Face. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) - Please make sure to upload both a CV and a portfolio ! Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! We are looking for Retail Creative Designer Intern to contribute to creative research, concept development, and graphic design for our The North Face retail spaces. The intern will work closely with the team to transform ideas into visual and spatial concepts, supporting projects from inspiration to execution. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Retail Creative Designer Intern for: - Developing 2D graphic layouts for brand campaign storytelling that engages, informs, and inspires our consumers - Design POP and strut cards for in store communication (for campaigns, promotions, special communications) - Co-work with 3D designer for the creative proposal for window & instore campaign execution. - Supporting for the design of graphic identity for retail activations and special events - Supporting the design of flagships executions and adapting window & instore executions for special locations. - Hoarding graphics design for new store openings - Support the development of new creative ideas like wall customisations, creation of corners and study new design elements to inject in our new stores TNF brand DNA as briefed by Retail Architects. - Support retail adaptations for Wholesale stores - Support the creation of the monthly retail marketing newsletter How you will make a difference - A degree in design, product design, interior design, architecture, or graphic design - Proficiency in 2D and 3D software for graphic design and modelling - Strong creativity in graphic design and concept development - Proficiency with Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign) - Passion for creative research and innovation in graphic design and spatial development - Ability to envision and create compelling concepts, from mood boards to full spatial designs - Excellent attention to detail and team collaboration skills - Fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills Curious mindset with passion for working with people What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: • Project coordination • Retail marketing principles • How to elevate brand representation instore • Manage retail marketing database (instore and window pictures, measurements, floor plans) • You will be expose to all the retail marketing team members, learning key principles of retail architectures, visual merchandising, retail activations and creative environment The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. - Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260210-0017

jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Retail Allocator Intern for Timberland. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Are you ready to turn data-driven decisions into winning retail strategies? Timberland is looking for a Retail Allocator intern to play a key role in ensuring the right product reaches the right store at the right time across EMEA. Support the allocation and replenishment of product to our EMEA retail stores by analysing sales trends, monitoring inventory levels, and ensuring accurate product flow to stores. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Retail allocator intern: - Report updating. - Manual allocation to stores. - Track stock levels, sales trends, and store performance to identify risks and opportunities, recommending adjustments to maximize in-season results. - Initial allocation set-up - Ad hoc analysis on products / performance. - Promotions upload in the system. - Warehouse logics and interaction. How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - You enjoy working with data and transforming numbers into clear, meaningful insights that support better decision‑making across Allocation & Planning - You have strong problem‑solving skills , and you naturally look for patterns, root causes, and opportunities to improve processes. - You are detail‑oriented yet able to zoom out , balancing accuracy with a good understanding of the bigger commercial picture. - You are proactive and comfortable taking ownership , even when facing new or ambiguous tasks—your initiative helps move projects forward. - You are curious and eager to learn new tools , especially analytics platforms, reporting environments, and product systems (no prior expertise needed—just motivation). What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Deep understanding of retail environment across Europe - Interactions across the different department (planning, allocation, merchandising, operations, marketing) - Understand main logic of a specific category allocation, giving inputs on product needs. - Understand the differences across countries in regards to product trends. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260204-0003

jobs.title: Digital Trading Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Digital Trading Intern for Timberland. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Become the engine behind our Digital Trading performance. Step into a fast‑paced, data‑driven environment where your work will directly elevate how consumers shop our brand across eCommerce and Digital Marketplace partners. You will support and coordinate day‑to‑day digital trading activities to maximize visibility, conversion, and revenue across our owned eCommerce platforms and Digital Marketplace partners. Drive actionable insights, ensure flawless execution, and help optimize performance levers to accelerate digital growth. Furthermore, you will: - Monitor and update daily trading performance dashboards, surfacing insights that support decision‑making. - Support building and executing trading calendar and provide weekly/monthly updates to the extended cross-functional team. - Assist in demand & inventory reviews , helping identify risks and opportunities across key accounts and categories. - Conduct competitive benchmarking , identifying trends, best sellers, gaps, and potential growth levers. - Lead or support additional cross‑functional projects within the Digital Trading team to drive continuous improvement and operational excellence. How you will make a difference - Strong analytical mindset with the ability to translate numbers into clear, actionable insights. - Curiosity for digital commerce, performance optimization, and online consumer behavior. - Attention to detail and a proactive approach to spotting issues before they become problems. - Comfort with fast‑paced environments, managing multiple tasks while keeping quality high. - Ability to collaborate effectively across teams such as merchandising, planning, marketing, and digital operations. - Problem‑solving attitude, always looking for smarter, more efficient ways of working. What’s in it for you - Hands‑on experience in Digital Trading , one of the fastest‑growing areas in the retail & brand ecosystem. - Exposure to eCommerce and Marketplace operations , from onsite execution to performance analysis. - Practical knowledge of performance metrics , dashboards, and commercial KPIs used by leading digital retailers. - Experience working cross‑functionally with merchandising, planning, marketing, and digital operations teams. - The opportunity to contribute to real‑world digital initiatives, building a strong foundation for a future career in digital retail, eCommerce, or marketplace management. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260206-0011

descriptionByLocale.de: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Digital Trading Intern for Timberland. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Become the engine behind our Digital Trading performance. Step into a fast‑paced, data‑driven environment where your work will directly elevate how consumers shop our brand across eCommerce and Digital Marketplace partners. You will support and coordinate day‑to‑day digital trading activities to maximize visibility, conversion, and revenue across our owned eCommerce platforms and Digital Marketplace partners. Drive actionable insights, ensure flawless execution, and help optimize performance levers to accelerate digital growth. Furthermore, you will: - Monitor and update daily trading performance dashboards, surfacing insights that support decision‑making. - Support building and executing trading calendar and provide weekly/monthly updates to the extended cross-functional team. - Assist in demand & inventory reviews , helping identify risks and opportunities across key accounts and categories. - Conduct competitive benchmarking , identifying trends, best sellers, gaps, and potential growth levers. - Lead or support additional cross‑functional projects within the Digital Trading team to drive continuous improvement and operational excellence. How you will make a difference - Strong analytical mindset with the ability to translate numbers into clear, actionable insights. - Curiosity for digital commerce, performance optimization, and online consumer behavior. - Attention to detail and a proactive approach to spotting issues before they become problems. - Comfort with fast‑paced environments, managing multiple tasks while keeping quality high. - Ability to collaborate effectively across teams such as merchandising, planning, marketing, and digital operations. - Problem‑solving attitude, always looking for smarter, more efficient ways of working. What’s in it for you - Hands‑on experience in Digital Trading , one of the fastest‑growing areas in the retail & brand ecosystem. - Exposure to eCommerce and Marketplace operations , from onsite execution to performance analysis. - Practical knowledge of performance metrics , dashboards, and commercial KPIs used by leading digital retailers. - Experience working cross‑functionally with merchandising, planning, marketing, and digital operations teams. - The opportunity to contribute to real‑world digital initiatives, building a strong foundation for a future career in digital retail, eCommerce, or marketplace management. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260206-0011

jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as PR & Brand Comms Intern for Timberland. ## About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . ## ## Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months, full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) ## Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA citizenship ## Let’s talk about the role! Are you passionate about storytelling and ready to shape how an iconic brand shows up across EMEA? We are looking for a PR & Marketing Intern to join TIMBERLAND within VF EMEA Internship Program. Drive impactful brand visibility by coordinating press materials, managing media interactions, and contributing to best‑in-class storytelling initiatives. ## ## Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for Supporting in Press Relations & Brand communications at EMEA level: - Daily interaction and exchange with countries Marketing Manager, agencies, TBL & VF internal functions and global team. - Support in defining structured EMEA seasonal PR roll out plans for the key markets managed by EMEA HQ - Support in PR activities managed by EMEA HQ (Media partnership, event management, editors’ seedings, activations) - Manage and deliver Global Press material to markets and wider TBL team (press releases and PR assets in files) - Develop press material (copywriting and proofing, distribution, ...) - Brand Calendar management: working with all internal and agencies: keep track of our key global/EMEA/ markets dates and key marketing styles throughout the season. - Sample management - support the marketing team with seasonal sample orders including tracking of deliveries as well as ad hoc sample requests (photo shooting e.t.c) - Attend and record notes at the PR team meetings and work cross-functionally to support PR team - Create several reports and presentations on various product launches and initiatives. - Maintain and update EMEA master media lists and seeding lists. - Reporting: performance and KPIs monitoring and deliveries of campaign/ monthly / quarterly reports - Respond to media requests for samples, information and press releases in a timely manner. - Work closely with Internal team to create synergies and increase visibility for Timberland (newsletter/ media alert/ …) - Build and maintain knowledge of competitive PR: Monitor competitor activities and share as required. ## What success looks like: Your skills in continuous improvement, decision making, planning & organizing, and customer focus – combined with your talent for collaboration, communication, and leveraging cultural diversity – will contribute to the team’s success. You are also adaptable in using applied learning; you initiate action and have high work standards. ## How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - You are fluent in English, with strong written communication skills and an instinct for brand storytelling. - You bring curiosity, adaptability, and the ability to thrive in fast‑paced, international environments. - You are proactive, well‑organized, and comfortable managing multiple tasks at once. - You are collaborative, culturally aware, and energized by connecting with people across teams and markets. - Previous experience through other internships, student projects, or extracurricular activities is considered a plus. ## A degree in Communications, Marketing, Fashion, Media or related fields is nice to have; what matters most is your passion and drive. ## What’s in it for you In this role, you will gain hands‑on experience at the intersection of PR, Marketing, and Brand Communication for one of the world’s most iconic outdoor lifestyle brands. At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have: - A deep understanding of how a global PR & Communications function operates in a multi‑market environment - Experience developing PR materials, managing press interactions, and supporting campaign execution - Strong skills in storytelling, content development, and cross‑functional coordination - Practical exposure to media relations, sample management, KPIs tracking, and PR reporting - A robust professional network across VF’s brands, teams, and markets ## The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12‑month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands‑on experience, including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. ## ## Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We celebrate the diversity of our associates and encourage everyone to bring their true selves to work every day. ## Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260209-0011

Here’s what you’ll be responsible for Supporting in Press Relations & Brand communications at EMEA level: - Daily interaction and exchange with countries Marketing Manager, agencies, TBL & VF internal functions and global team. - Support in defining structured EMEA seasonal PR roll out plans for the key markets managed by EMEA HQ - Support in PR activities managed by EMEA HQ (Media partnership, event management, editors’ seedings, activations) - Manage and deliver Global Press material to markets and wider TBL team (press releases and PR assets in files) - Develop press material (copywriting and proofing, distribution, ...) - Brand Calendar management: working with all internal and agencies: keep track of our key global/EMEA/ markets dates and key marketing styles throughout the season. - Sample management - support the marketing team with seasonal sample orders including tracking of deliveries as well as ad hoc sample requests (photo shooting e.t.c) - Attend and record notes at the PR team meetings and work cross-functionally to support PR team - Create several reports and presentations on various product launches and initiatives. - Maintain and update EMEA master media lists and seeding lists. - Reporting: performance and KPIs monitoring and deliveries of campaign/ monthly / quarterly reports - Respond to media requests for samples, information and press releases in a timely manner. - Work closely with Internal team to create synergies and increase visibility for Timberland (newsletter/ media alert/ …) - Build and maintain knowledge of competitive PR: Monitor competitor activities and share as required. ## What success looks like: Your skills in continuous improvement, decision making, planning & organizing, and customer focus – combined with your talent for collaboration, communication, and leveraging cultural diversity – will contribute to the team’s success. You are also adaptable in using applied learning; you initiate action and have high work standards. ## How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - You are fluent in English, with strong written communication skills and an instinct for brand storytelling. - You bring curiosity, adaptability, and the ability to thrive in fast‑paced, international environments. - You are proactive, well‑organized, and comfortable managing multiple tasks at once. - You are collaborative, culturally aware, and energized by connecting with people across teams and markets. - Previous experience through other internships, student projects, or extracurricular activities is considered a plus. ## A degree in Communications, Marketing, Fashion, Media or related fields is nice to have; what matters most is your passion and drive. ## What’s in it for you In this role, you will gain hands‑on experience at the intersection of PR, Marketing, and Brand Communication for one of the world’s most iconic outdoor lifestyle brands. At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have: - A deep understanding of how a global PR & Communications function operates in a multi‑market environment - Experience developing PR materials, managing press interactions, and supporting campaign execution - Strong skills in storytelling, content development, and cross‑functional coordination - Practical exposure to media relations, sample management, KPIs tracking, and PR reporting - A robust professional network across VF’s brands, teams, and markets ## The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12‑month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands‑on experience, including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. ## ## Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We celebrate the diversity of our associates and encourage everyone to bring their true selves to work every day. ## Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260209-0011

jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Merchandiser Intern for Timberland. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Are you ready to support driving the footwear merchandising vision for our key wholesale partners across EMEA, ensuring the right products, assortments, and strategies reach the right consumers at the right time? You will support the execution of the footwear merchandising strategy for our wholesale partners, ensuring the right assortments, pricing, and consumer‑relevant stories are delivered to maximize brand impact and sell‑through. Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Merchandiser Intern: - Support the coordination of seasonal assortments for wholesale accounts. - Manage all sample orders, tracking, organization, and meetings preparation. - Update PLM data to keep product information accurate and current. - Maintain LP documents, ensuring assortments and SKUs stay up to date. - Prepare presentations for sell‑in meetings and internal product reviews. - Assist with pricing checks, SKUs validation, and seasonal readiness tasks. - Collaborate with cross‑functional teams on merchandising initiatives. How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - Proactive mindset with the ability to take initiative and drive tasks forward. - Strong Excel and PowerPoint skills to support data analysis and presentation creation. - Open‑minded approach with curiosity for product, trends, and consumer behavior. - Effective collaborator who enjoys working within cross‑functional teams. - Fluent English communication in an international, fast‑paced environment. - Passion and sensitivity for fashion and footwear product . What’s in it for you At the end of the internship, you can expect to have a clear understanding of how to collaborate with the Global Footwear team in the US, how to partner effectively with EMEA Sales and Marketing, and how to deliver impactful product presentations to both internal sales teams and key strategic accounts. You will also develop strong footwear product knowledge through hands‑on learning, exposure to the full merchandising process, and direct coaching from industry experts, equipping you with the confidence and skills needed to grow within the footwear and fashion industry. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260205-0011
