jobs.title: Supply Chain, Data & Analytics Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland a s Supply Chain, Data & Analytics Intern within Supply Chain Operations department. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Do you thrive on turning complex data into powerful insights that guide smarter, faster business decisions? VF Corporation is looking for an exceptio nal Supply Chain, Data & Analytics Intern t o join out team based in Stabio, Switzerland. In this role you will create analysis on various Supply Chain areas throughout the go-to-market process. You will also assist your manager in reporting and analyzing key Supply Chain KPIs to provide regular updates to Brand representatives and the Supply Chain Community and Leadership. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Supply Chain Data & Analytics Intern: - Create and implement analyses, reports, and dashboards to track Supply Chain performance and efficiency - Support the preparation of weekly/monthly reporting to be distributed to Supply Chain Community and to the Brands (i.e. On-Time Delivery to Customers, On-Time Stock Availability, Inventory Summary, DC Processing Performance, …) - Collaborate with Supply Chain functions and other business stakeholders to identify and formalize reporting/analytics requirements - Collaborate with Digital & Technology Analytics or BI functions to validate and bring live new Analytics models/solutions - Ensure the accuracy and transparency of all data shared with central functions and brands How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - Fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills - Basic knowledge of MS Power BI as visualization tool - IBM Cognos experience is a plus - Basic understanding of supply chain processes - Passionate for insight-driven thinking, can extract patterns from volumes of data to drive insights - Strong attention to details, and commitment to drive data accuracy - Good communication and presentation (including written) skills What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Main processes across different Supply Chain functions (i.e. DC Operations, Outbound Logistics, Customer Service, …) - Meaning of main KPIs measuring Supply Chain performance, how to calculate them and how to approach a deep dive analysis on the results - MS Power BI best practices to build interactive analysis covering both strategic and operational KPIs - Project management principles applied to Analytics solutions design and implementation You will also have the opportunity to interact and collaborate with colleagues in other regions (America or Asia), participating to international projects aimed to define a new Global Supply Chain KPIs Framework. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260212-0009

Collaborate with Supply Chain functions and other business stakeholders to identify and formalize reporting/analytics requirements - Collaborate with Digital & Technology Analytics or BI functions to validate and bring live new Analytics models/solutions - Ensure the accuracy and transparency of all data shared with central functions and brands How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - Fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills - Basic knowledge of MS Power BI as visualization tool - IBM Cognos experience is a plus - Basic understanding of supply chain processes - Passionate for insight-driven thinking, can extract patterns from volumes of data to drive insights - Strong attention to details, and commitment to drive data accuracy - Good communication and presentation (including written) skills What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Main processes across different Supply Chain functions (i.e. DC Operations, Outbound Logistics, Customer Service, …) - Meaning of main KPIs measuring Supply Chain performance, how to calculate them and how to approach a deep dive analysis on the results - MS Power BI best practices to build interactive analysis covering both strategic and operational KPIs - Project management principles applied to Analytics solutions design and implementation You will also have the opportunity to interact and collaborate with colleagues in other regions (America or Asia), participating to international projects aimed to define a new Global Supply Chain KPIs Framework. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260212-0009

jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Legal Intern for VF EMEA Legal Department. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Are you ready to be introduced to the multifaceted world of corporate law within the retail industry in the EMEA region? VF is looking for a Legal Intern to join the Wholesale Business Area of the EMEA Legal Team based in Stabio, Switzerland. As a Legal Intern you will be offered a real-world exposure to in-house legal operations, including contract drafting and review and compliance checks. You will apply your academic knowledge in real-world legal challenges, promoting the synthesis of classroom teachings with practical experiences. You will work closely with legal professionals, expanding your professional network and understanding the importance of team dynamics in legal settings. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Legal Intern: - Performing legal research activities, including the review, study and analysis of relevant legislation, regulations and case law across the EMEA region. - Draft, review and negotiate various contracts (e.g. Partnership Stores Agreements, Distributorship Agreements, etc.), ensuring they align with VF Corporation’s interests and legal standards. - Assist other legal professionals in handling actual cases, observing and contributing to the resolution process. - Provide support to the team in the management, organization, and maintenance of archived documents and contracts. How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - You are studying Law while beginning the internship or you have recently graduated in Law (after May 1st, 2026). - You are fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills. - You have curious mindset with passion for working with people. - You are eager to learn and face up new challenges. - First experiences such as other internships, extracurricular activities, is considered a plus. What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Legal Landscape of the Retail Industry: insights into the specific legal challenges and regulations. - Contract Drafting and Review: handling real contract negotiations and learning the art of compromise without compromising the company’s interests. - Stakeholder Engagement: the importance and methods of effectively communicating legal insights to non-legal stakeholders within the corporation. - Enhanced Professional Network: building relationships with legal professionals and leaders in the retail industry. - Applied Problem Solving: transitioning from theoretical knowledge to practical application in real-world business scenarios. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260218-0012

We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260218-0012
descriptionByLocale.fr: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Legal Intern for VF EMEA Legal Department. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Are you ready to be introduced to the multifaceted world of corporate law within the retail industry in the EMEA region? VF is looking for a Legal Intern to join the Wholesale Business Area of the EMEA Legal Team based in Stabio, Switzerland. As a Legal Intern you will be offered a real-world exposure to in-house legal operations, including contract drafting and review and compliance checks. You will apply your academic knowledge in real-world legal challenges, promoting the synthesis of classroom teachings with practical experiences. You will work closely with legal professionals, expanding your professional network and understanding the importance of team dynamics in legal settings. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Legal Intern: - Performing legal research activities, including the review, study and analysis of relevant legislation, regulations and case law across the EMEA region. - Draft, review and negotiate various contracts (e.g. Partnership Stores Agreements, Distributorship Agreements, etc.), ensuring they align with VF Corporation’s interests and legal standards. - Assist other legal professionals in handling actual cases, observing and contributing to the resolution process. - Provide support to the team in the management, organization, and maintenance of archived documents and contracts. How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - You are studying Law while beginning the internship or you have recently graduated in Law (after May 1st, 2026). - You are fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills. - You have curious mindset with passion for working with people. - You are eager to learn and face up new challenges. - First experiences such as other internships, extracurricular activities, is considered a plus. What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Legal Landscape of the Retail Industry: insights into the specific legal challenges and regulations. - Contract Drafting and Review: handling real contract negotiations and learning the art of compromise without compromising the company’s interests. - Stakeholder Engagement: the importance and methods of effectively communicating legal insights to non-legal stakeholders within the corporation. - Enhanced Professional Network: building relationships with legal professionals and leaders in the retail industry. - Applied Problem Solving: transitioning from theoretical knowledge to practical application in real-world business scenarios. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Internal Audit Intern for VF Corporation. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Join an electric, evolving and growing team to support VF business both with assurance and advisory projects. Add value with your experience in improving VF processes and enriching Internal Audit program and department. Support your team members with the projects included in annual Internal Audit Plan and in the SOx program, push boundaries with new ideas, approached and proposals. Be proactive and ask, learn, challenge the status quo. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as Internal Audit Intern: - Participate in person in delivering Internal audits, Sox related reviews and advisory projects both with reference to internal and external resources. - Confirm and complete the scope of the audit/review with the relevant owner or audit liaison. - Collaborate in creating or evolving audit programs, conduct the audit/review and participate in the report issuance for financial, operational, IT, Supply Chain or HR related audits and advisory projects. - Prepare the working papers ensuring that the audit objectives are met, and evidence supports the findings. - Prepare reports of findings and recommendations and present to Management. How you will make a difference We all have unique skills that we bring to work and celebrate every day. For this role, there are foundation skills you’ll need to succeed and excel: - Minimum of a Bachelor’s in one of the following fields of concentration – Accounting, Finance, Business, Data Analytics, IT/Information Security/Cyber Security, Supply Chain Management or similar - Certification preferred which may include CPA, CISA, CIA, and/or CFE - Technologically proficiency (i.e., Excel and PowerPoint required, Power BI preferred, any other Data Analytics tool is a plus) - Sense of urgency and strong organizational skills - Bring new ideas and challenge the status quo Skills that will make you succeed: - Strong presentation, verbal, and written skills - Strong analytical thinking, attention to detail, and problem solving - Strong verbal and written English skills, additional languages a plus - Great team working attitude and open mildness What’s in it for you At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Meaningful projects work that drives business impact - Wide range of processes, from Finance to Supply Chain, IT and Operations - Regulatory requirements in different fields (Ex: SOx; CRSD; ISO9001 etc) - An holistic and eclectic way of collaborate and working with business leaders - How priorities are managed in a growing and evolving Internal Audit group The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. jobs.title: Digital Sales Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF2
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Digital Sales Intern for Smartwool & icebreaker. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Ready to help shape how Smartwool & Icebreaker show up across Zalando, Amazon, and other digital platforms across EMEA? Join our Digital Platforms team and support two purpose-led, merino-obsessed outdoor brands in growing their presence with key digital partners. Contribute to the daily execution and long‑term evolution of our digital marketplace presence, helping us drive visibility, conversion, and brand excellence across key online partners. Support platform coordination, performance monitoring, and cross-functional collaboration to keep our digital ecosystem running smoothly. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for as a Digital Platforms Intern: - Coordinate daily activities across digital marketplaces and strategic accounts to keep launches, updates, and optimizations on track. - Support initiatives to drive conversion by ensuring products, content, and campaigns land effectively across platforms. - Develop and refine tools, trackers, and processes to help the team monitor performance and unlock new opportunities. - Contribute to relationship‑building with both internal and external partners, helping strengthen collaboration. - Bring fresh ideas to help expand Smartwool & Icebreaker’s presence across digital environments. - Assist with additional projects within the Digital Platforms team as needed. How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - You’re fluent in English and comfortable communicating clearly, with the ability to give context so others can easily follow your questions or updates. - You have a solid grasp of Excel fundamentals, including filters, VLOOKUP (or XLOOKUP), pivot tables, and working with large raw datasets. - You enjoy solving problems through data and aren’t afraid to dive into detailed spreadsheets or performance reports. - You bring curiosity, initiative, and the drive to learn quickly in a dynamic, cross‑functional environment. - Early experience through internships, projects, or extracurricular roles shows your ability to take ownership and follow through. A degree is great, but we care most about your mindset, curiosity, and ability to work with data and people in a fast‑moving environment. What’s in it for you In this internship, you’ll discover how two global outdoor merino brands can complement each other in serving different consumers across diverse digital channels - and you’ll be right at the heart of it. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. jobs.title: AI & Digital Innovation Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as AI & Digital Innovation Intern for the Digital Technology team. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Bring your builder mindset to scale AI across iconic outdoor brands. We’re hiring an AI & Digital Innovation Intern to drive rapid experimentation with tools and workflows that improve digital experiences end - to - end. Drive rapid experimentation across ecommerce by evaluating and testing digital tools, platforms, and workflows that improve brand experiences and team productivity. Collaborate cross functionally with engineering, design, and marketing to pilot solutions, research emerging trends in AI/DXP, and present clear recommendations backed by lightweight experiments and metrics. Get ready to make an impact! Here’s what you’ll be responsible for joining our team as AI & Digital Innovation Intern : - Assist in evaluating and testing new digital tools, platforms, and workflows that improve brand experiences across e-commerce storefronts - Collaborate with engineering, design, and marketing teams to support project delivery and cross-functional communication - Research emerging trends in e-commerce, AI, and digital experience platforms and present findings to the team - Craft and refine prompts & guardrails for internal AI tools to support tasks like content ideation, QA, and consumer insights. - Frame problems into hypotheses and design lightweight experiments (pilots/AB tests, before after studies), define success metrics, and report outcomes with clear narratives. How you will make a difference You’ll make a difference by bringing a entrepreneur mindset—spotting opportunities, trying things quickly, and turning simple ideas into real, measurable improvements. Your curiosity for AI and talent for crafting smart prompts will help our teams experiment faster and unlock new ways of working. Skills that will make you succeed: - Problem framing & experimentation skills —ability to translate ambiguous needs into clear hypotheses, simple test designs, and meaningful, business relevant metrics. - E-commerce and DXP intuition —familiarity with storefront UX, content workflows, CMS/DXP concepts (nice to have, not mandatory). - Storytelling that drives decisions —turn complex tests into crisp narratives, demos, and recommendations for nontechnical stakeholders. - An engineering degree is nice to have, but not required —we care most about your curiosity, projects, and evidence of impact. What’s in it for you In the role of AI & Digital Innovation Intern, you will work side by side with engineering, design, and marketing; learn how decisions travel from strategy to storefront. Gain a front row seat to ecommerce, AI, and DXP trends in a multi - brand environment with global reach. We will support you with ad hoc trainings and networking opportunities across other functions and brands! At the end of the Internship period, you can expect to have a clear understanding of the below: - Handson AI in the real world: go from idea to pilot to measurable impact across multiple brands’ ecommerce experiences. - Mentorship & craft growth: guided learning in experimentation, prompt design, and AI product thinking; access to team playbooks and internal training. - Portfolio ready outcomes: ship case studies, prompt libraries, enablement assets, and experiment readouts you can proudly showcase. The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260213-0011

descriptionByLocale.it: Sii un sognatore, fai la differenza! Unisciti al #VFInternshipProgram nel nostro quartier generale EMEA a Stabio, in Svizzera, come stagista in materia di intelligenza artificiale e innovazione digitale per il team di tecnologia digitale. Informazioni su VF VF sta ridefinendo il significato di essere la migliore azienda di abbigliamento, calzature e attrezzature al mondo, alimentando marchi iconici di stile di vita attivo tra cui The North Face®, Vans® e Timberland®. Scopri di più su http://vfc.com. Informazioni chiave - Data di inizio: 1 giugno 2026 - Durata: 12 mesi, a tempo pieno - Stipendio mensile lordo: 1'850 CHF - Sede: sede centrale VF EMEA a Stabio, Svizzera - Processo di reclutamento semplificato: 3 colloqui (reclutatore, responsabile delle assunzioni, potenziale business case) Requisiti di idoneità - Devi laurearti dopo il 1 maggio 2026 OPPURE devi avere uno status di studente a giugno 2026 - Devi possedere la cittadinanza UE o SEE (Spazio economico europeo). Parliamo del ruolo! Porta la tua mentalità da costruttore per adattare l'intelligenza artificiale a marchi iconici dell'outdoor. Stiamo assumendo uno stagista in intelligenza artificiale e innovazione digitale per guidare una rapida sperimentazione con strumenti e flussi di lavoro che migliorano le esperienze digitali end-to-end. Promuovi una rapida sperimentazione nell'e-commerce valutando e testando strumenti digitali, piattaforme e flussi di lavoro che migliorano l'esperienza del marchio e la produttività del team. Collabora in modo interfunzionale con ingegneria, progettazione e marketing per pilotare soluzioni, ricercare tendenze emergenti in AI/DXP e presentare raccomandazioni chiare supportate da esperimenti e metriche leggeri. Preparati a lasciare il segno! Ecco di cosa sarai responsabile se ti unirai al nostro team come stagista AI e innovazione digitale: - Assistere nella valutazione e nel test di nuovi strumenti digitali, piattaforme e flussi di lavoro che migliorano l'esperienza del marchio nelle vetrine di e-commerce - Collaborare con team di ingegneria, progettazione e marketing per supportare la consegna del progetto e la comunicazione interfunzionale - Ricercare le tendenze emergenti nell'e-commerce, nell'intelligenza artificiale e nelle piattaforme di esperienza digitale e presentare i risultati al team - Creare e perfezionare suggerimenti e guardrail per strumenti di intelligenza artificiale interni per supportare attività come ideazione di contenuti, QA e consumo intuizioni. - Inquadrare i problemi in ipotesi e progettare esperimenti leggeri (test pilota/AB, studi prima e dopo), definire le metriche di successo e riportare i risultati con narrazioni chiare. Come farai la differenza Farai la differenza portando una mentalità da imprenditore: individuando opportunità, provando rapidamente le cose e trasformando idee semplici in miglioramenti reali e misurabili. La tua curiosità per l'intelligenza artificiale e il tuo talento nel creare suggerimenti intelligenti aiuteranno i nostri team a sperimentare più velocemente e a sbloccare nuovi modi di lavorare. Competenze che ti faranno avere successo: - Capacità di inquadramento dei problemi e di sperimentazione: capacità di tradurre esigenze ambigue in ipotesi chiare, semplici progetti di test e metriche significative e rilevanti per il business. - Intuizione per l'e-commerce e DXP: familiarità con l'UX del negozio, i flussi di lavoro dei contenuti, i concetti CMS/DXP (bello da avere, non obbligatorio). - Storytelling che guida le decisioni: trasforma test complessi in narrazioni, demo e raccomandazioni nitide per le parti interessate non tecniche. - Una laurea in ingegneria è utile, ma non obbligatoria: ci interessano soprattutto la tua curiosità, i tuoi progetti e le prove del tuo impatto. Cosa ci guadagni nel ruolo di stagista in intelligenza artificiale e innovazione digitale, lavorerai fianco a fianco con ingegneria, progettazione e marketing; scopri come le decisioni viaggiano dalla strategia al negozio. Ottieni un posto in prima fila per le tendenze dell'e-commerce, dell'intelligenza artificiale e della DXP in un ambiente multimarca di portata globale. Ti supporteremo con corsi di formazione ad hoc e opportunità di networking tra altre funzioni e marchi! Alla fine del periodo di tirocinio, puoi aspettarti di avere una chiara comprensione di quanto segue: - AI pratica nel mondo reale: passa dall'idea al progetto pilota fino all'impatto misurabile nelle esperienze di e-commerce di più marchi. - Mentorship e crescita artigianale: apprendimento guidato nella sperimentazione, progettazione rapida e pensiero del prodotto AI; accesso ai playbook del team e alla formazione interna. - Risultati pronti per il portfolio: spedisci case study, librerie di prompt, risorse di abilitazione e letture di esperimenti che puoi mostrare con orgoglio. Il programma di stage VF EMEA è un viaggio di 12 mesi progettato per sviluppare e potenziare i talenti emergenti all'inizio della loro carriera. Ci impegniamo a liberare il tuo potenziale, quindi puoi aspettarti un percorso di apprendimento strutturato e una ricca esperienza pratica, tra cui: - Workshop dedicati allo sviluppo delle competenze e progetti di gruppo di consulenza interna - Una giornata di lavoro in negozio per acquisire informazioni reali sui nostri marchi - Opportunità di networking con colleghi e leadership senior Non possiamo garantire che lo stage ti porterà successivamente a un contratto, ma grazie al valore dell'esperienza la maggior parte dei nostri stagisti rimane in azienda dopo il periodo di stage. Poiché vogliamo che tu ti concentri su ciò che conta, offriamo vantaggi completi che incoraggiano il benessere mentale, fisico e finanziario. Potrai usufruire di: - Politica di lavoro ibrido - Sconto del 50% sui marchi VF - Palestra in loco, che offre iniziative per la salute e il benessere - Mensa sovvenzionata e aree relax che offrono bevande gratuite - Bus navetta per l'ufficio o sconto sui trasporti pubblici, a seconda della posizione - Una fiorente comunità di stagisti, con persone di diversa provenienza, stile di vita e nazionalità che amano lavorare insieme. Libertà di essere, inclusione e appartenenza In qualità di datore di lavoro per le pari opportunità, ci impegniamo a promuovere una cultura di appartenenza basata sul rispetto, la connessione, l'apertura e l'autenticità. Ci impegniamo a costruire e mantenere un ambiente di lavoro che celebri la diversità dei nostri dipendenti, consentendo loro di portare il loro sé autentico al lavoro ogni giorno. Ci sei? Candidati ora: la domanda anticipata aumenta le tue possibilità! #prontiperapplicareR-20260213-0011
descriptionByLocale.de: Seien Sie ein Träumer, machen Sie den Unterschied! Nehmen Sie am #VFInternshipProgram in unserem EMEA-Hauptsitz in Stabio, Schweiz, als Praktikant im Bereich KI und digitale Innovation für das Team für digitale Technologie teil. Über VF VF definiert neu, was es bedeutet, das weltbeste Bekleidungs-, Schuh- und Ausrüstungsunternehmen zu sein, und unterstützt ikonische aktive Lifestyle-Marken wie The North Face®, Vans® und Timberland®. Erfahren Sie mehr unter http://vfc.com. Wichtige Informationen – Startdatum: 1. Juni 2026 – Dauer: 12 Monate, Vollzeit – Bruttomonatsgehalt: 1.850 CHF – Standort: VF EMEA-Hauptsitz in Stabio, Schweiz – Optimierter Rekrutierungsprozess: 3 Vorstellungsgespräche (Personalvermittler, Einstellungsmanager, potenzieller Business Case) Zulassungsvoraussetzungen – Sie müssen Ihren Abschluss nach dem 1. Mai 2026 machen ODER Sie müssen ab Juni einen Studentenstatus haben 2026 – Sie müssen die Staatsbürgerschaft der EU oder des EWR (Europäischer Wirtschaftsraum) besitzen. Sprechen wir über die Rolle! Bringen Sie Ihre bauunternehmerische Denkweise ein, um die KI für ikonische Outdoor-Marken zu skalieren. Wir stellen einen Praktikanten für KI und digitale Innovation ein, um das schnelle Experimentieren mit Tools und Arbeitsabläufen voranzutreiben, die das digitale Erlebnis durchgängig verbessern. Fördern Sie schnelle Experimente im gesamten E-Commerce, indem Sie digitale Tools, Plattformen und Arbeitsabläufe evaluieren und testen, die das Markenerlebnis und die Teamproduktivität verbessern. Arbeiten Sie funktionsübergreifend mit Technik, Design und Marketing zusammen, um Pilotlösungen zu entwickeln, neue Trends in der KI/DXP zu erforschen und klare Empfehlungen zu präsentieren, die durch einfache Experimente und Metriken gestützt werden. Machen Sie sich bereit, etwas zu bewirken! Als Praktikant im Bereich KI und digitale Innovation sind Sie für die Aufnahme in unser Team verantwortlich: - Unterstützung bei der Evaluierung und Erprobung neuer digitaler Tools, Plattformen und Arbeitsabläufe, die das Markenerlebnis in allen E-Commerce-Storefronts verbessern - Zusammenarbeit mit Technik-, Design- und Marketingteams zur Unterstützung der Projektabwicklung und funktionsübergreifenden Kommunikation - Erforschung neuer Trends in E-Commerce, KI und digitalen Erlebnisplattformen und Präsentation der Ergebnisse dem Team - Erstellung und Verfeinerung von Eingabeaufforderungen und Leitplanken für interne KI-Tools zur Unterstützung von Aufgaben wie Inhaltsideenbildung, Qualitätssicherung und Verbrauchereinblicke. - Formulieren Sie Probleme in Hypothesen und entwerfen Sie leichtgewichtige Experimente (Pilot-/AB-Tests, Vorher-Nachher-Studien), definieren Sie Erfolgsmetriken und berichten Sie über Ergebnisse mit klaren Narrativen. Wie Sie einen Unterschied machen werden Sie werden einen Unterschied machen, indem Sie eine unternehmerische Denkweise mitbringen – Chancen erkennen, Dinge schnell ausprobieren und einfache Ideen in echte, messbare Verbesserungen umsetzen. Ihre Neugier für KI und Ihr Talent für die Erstellung intelligenter Eingabeaufforderungen werden unseren Teams helfen, schneller zu experimentieren und neue Arbeitsweisen zu erschließen. Fähigkeiten, die Ihnen zum Erfolg verhelfen: - Problemstellungs- und Experimentierfähigkeiten – Fähigkeit, mehrdeutige Anforderungen in klare Hypothesen, einfache Testdesigns und aussagekräftige, geschäftsrelevante Metriken umzusetzen. - E-Commerce- und DXP-Intuition – Vertrautheit mit Storefront UX, Content-Workflows, CMS/DXP-Konzepten (nice to have, nicht zwingend erforderlich). - Storytelling, das Entscheidungen vorantreibt – verwandeln Sie komplexe Tests in klare Erzählungen, Demos und Empfehlungen für nicht-technische Stakeholder. - Ein Ingenieurabschluss ist schön, aber nicht zwingend erforderlich – Ihre Neugier, Ihre Projekte und Ihre Wirkungsnachweise liegen uns am Herzen. Was Sie davon haben: In der Rolle des Praktikanten für KI und digitale Innovation arbeiten Sie Seite an Seite mit Technik, Design und Marketing. Erfahren Sie, wie Entscheidungen von der Strategie zum Schaufenster gelangen. Verschaffen Sie sich einen Platz in der ersten Reihe und erleben Sie E-Commerce-, KI- und DXP-Trends in einer Umgebung mit mehreren Marken und globaler Reichweite. Wir unterstützen Sie mit Ad-hoc-Schulungen und Networking-Möglichkeiten über andere Funktionen und Marken hinweg! Am Ende des Praktikums können Sie davon ausgehen, dass Sie über ein klares Verständnis der folgenden Punkte verfügen: - Praktische KI in der realen Welt: Von der Idee zum Pilotprojekt bis hin zu messbaren Auswirkungen auf die E-Commerce-Erlebnisse mehrerer Marken. - Mentoring und handwerkliches Wachstum: geführtes Lernen in den Bereichen Experimentieren, promptes Design und KI-Produktdenken; Zugriff auf Team-Playbooks und interne Schulungen. - Portfoliofertige Ergebnisse: Fallstudien ausliefern, Prompt-Bibliotheken, Aktivierungsressourcen und Experimentierberichte, die Sie stolz präsentieren können. Das VF EMEA-Praktikumsprogramm ist eine 12-monatige Reise, die darauf abzielt, aufstrebende Talente zu Beginn ihrer Karriere zu fördern und zu stärken. Wir sind bestrebt, Ihr Potenzial freizusetzen, sodass Sie einen strukturierten Lernpfad und umfangreiche praktische Erfahrungen erwarten können, einschließlich: - Spezielle Workshops zum Aufbau von Fähigkeiten und internes Beratungsgruppenprojekt - Ein Arbeitstag im Geschäft, um echte Einblicke in unsere Marken zu gewinnen - Networking-Möglichkeiten mit Kollegen und Führungskräften Wir können nicht garantieren, dass das Praktikum Sie anschließend zu einem Vertrag führt, aber dank des Werts der Erfahrung bleiben die meisten unserer Praktikanten nach der Praktikumszeit im Unternehmen. Da wir möchten, dass Sie sich auf das Wesentliche konzentrieren können, bieten wir umfassende Leistungen, die das geistige, körperliche und finanzielle Wohlbefinden fördern. Sie werden Folgendes genießen: - Hybride Arbeitspolitik - 50 % Rabatt auf VF-Marken - Fitnessstudio vor Ort mit Gesundheits- und Wohlfühlinitiativen - Subventionierte Kantine sowie Pausenbereiche mit kostenlosen Getränken - Shuttlebus zum Büro oder Ermäßigung auf öffentliche Verkehrsmittel, je nach Standort - Eine lebendige Praktikantengemeinschaft mit Menschen unterschiedlicher Herkunft, Lebensstil und Nationalität, die gerne zusammenarbeiten. Frei sein, Inklusion und Zugehörigkeit Als Arbeitgeber, der Chancengleichheit bietet, streben wir danach, eine Kultur der Zugehörigkeit zu fördern, die auf Respekt, Verbundenheit, Offenheit und Authentizität basiert. Wir engagieren uns für den Aufbau und Erhalt eines Arbeitsplatzes, der die Vielfalt unserer Mitarbeiter würdigt und es ihnen ermöglicht, jeden Tag ihr authentisches Selbst bei der Arbeit einzubringen. Bist du dabei? Bewerben Sie sich jetzt – eine frühzeitige Bewerbung erhöht Ihre Chancen! #readytoapply R-20260213-0011
descriptionByLocale.fr: Soyez un rêveur, faites la différence ! Rejoignez #VFInternshipProgram dans notre siège EMEA à Stabio, en Suisse, en tant que stagiaire en IA et innovation numérique pour l'équipe de technologie numérique. À propos de VF VF redéfinit ce que signifie être la meilleure entreprise de vêtements, de chaussures et d'équipement au monde, en soutenant des marques emblématiques de style de vie actif, notamment The North Face®, Vans® et Timberland®. Apprenez-en davantage sur http://vfc.com. Informations clés - Date de début : 1er juin 2026 - Durée : 12 mois, temps plein - Salaire mensuel brut : 1'850 CHF - Localisation : Siège social de VF EMEA à Stabio, Suisse - Processus de recrutement rationalisé : 3 entretiens (Recruteur, Hiring Manager, potentiel Business Case) Conditions d'éligibilité - Vous devez être diplômé après le 1er mai 2026 OU vous devez avoir un statut d'étudiant à partir de juin 2026 - Vous doit détenir la citoyenneté de l’UE ou de l’EEE (Espace économique européen) Parlons du rôle ! Apportez votre état d’esprit de constructeur pour faire évoluer l’IA au sein de marques emblématiques de produits de plein air. Nous recrutons un stagiaire en IA et innovation numérique pour piloter une expérimentation rapide d'outils et de flux de travail qui améliorent les expériences numériques de bout en bout. Favorisez une expérimentation rapide dans le commerce électronique en évaluant et en testant des outils, des plates-formes et des flux de travail numériques qui améliorent les expériences de marque et la productivité des équipes. Collaborez de manière interfonctionnelle avec l'ingénierie, la conception et le marketing pour piloter des solutions, rechercher les tendances émergentes en matière d'IA/DXP et présenter des recommandations claires étayées par des expériences et des mesures légères. Préparez-vous à avoir un impact ! Voici ce que vous serez chargé de rejoindre notre équipe en tant que stagiaire en IA et innovation numérique : - Aider à évaluer et tester de nouveaux outils, plates-formes et flux de travail numériques qui améliorent les expériences de marque dans les vitrines de commerce électronique - Collaborer avec les équipes d'ingénierie, de conception et de marketing pour soutenir la réalisation de projets et la communication interfonctionnelle - Rechercher les tendances émergentes dans le domaine du commerce électronique, de l'IA et des plates-formes d'expérience numérique et présenter les résultats à l'équipe - Créer et affiner les invites et les garde-fous pour les outils d'IA internes afin de prendre en charge des tâches telles que l'idéation de contenu, l'assurance qualité et perceptions des consommateurs. - Formuler les problèmes en hypothèses et concevoir des expériences légères (pilotes/tests AB, études avant-après), définir des indicateurs de réussite et rapporter les résultats avec des récits clairs. Comment vous ferez la différence Vous ferez la différence en faisant preuve d’un état d’esprit d’entrepreneur : repérer les opportunités, essayer les choses rapidement et transformer des idées simples en améliorations réelles et mesurables. Votre curiosité pour l'IA et votre talent pour créer des invites intelligentes aideront nos équipes à expérimenter plus rapidement et à débloquer de nouvelles façons de travailler. Compétences qui vous permettront de réussir : - Compétences en matière de formulation de problèmes et d'expérimentation : capacité à traduire des besoins ambigus en hypothèses claires, en conceptions de tests simples et en mesures significatives et pertinentes pour l'entreprise. - Intuition E-commerce et DXP — familiarité avec l'UX de vitrine, les workflows de contenu, les concepts CMS/DXP (agréable à avoir, pas obligatoire). - Une narration qui guide les décisions : transformez des tests complexes en récits clairs, en démonstrations et en recommandations pour les parties prenantes non techniques. - Un diplôme d'ingénieur est agréable, mais pas obligatoire : nous nous soucions avant tout de votre curiosité, de vos projets et des preuves de votre impact. Qu'est-ce que cela vous apporte Dans le rôle de stagiaire en IA et innovation numérique, vous travaillerez côte à côte avec l'ingénierie, la conception et le marketing ; découvrez comment les décisions passent de la stratégie à la vitrine. Soyez aux premières loges des tendances du commerce électronique, de l'IA et du DXP dans un environnement multimarque de portée mondiale. Nous vous accompagnerons avec des formations ad hoc et des opportunités de réseautage au sein d’autres fonctions et marques ! À la fin de la période de stage, vous pouvez vous attendre à avoir une compréhension claire des éléments suivants : - Handson AI dans le monde réel : passer de l'idée au pilote jusqu'à un impact mesurable sur les expériences de commerce électronique de plusieurs marques. - Mentorat et développement de l'artisanat : apprentissage guidé en matière d'expérimentation, de conception rapide et de réflexion sur les produits d'IA ; accès aux playbooks de l’équipe et à la formation interne. - Résultats prêts pour le portfolio : expédiez des études de cas, des bibliothèques d'invites, des ressources d'activation et des lectures d'expériences que vous pouvez fièrement présenter. Le programme de stages VF EMEA est un voyage de 12 mois conçu pour développer et responsabiliser les talents émergents au début de leur carrière. Nous nous engageons à libérer votre potentiel, vous pouvez donc vous attendre à un parcours d'apprentissage structuré et à une riche expérience pratique, comprenant : - Des ateliers dédiés de développement des compétences et un projet de groupe de conseil interne - Une journée de travail en magasin pour acquérir de véritables connaissances sur nos marques - Des opportunités de réseautage avec des pairs et la haute direction Nous ne pouvons pas garantir que le stage vous mènera à un contrat par la suite, mais grâce à la valeur de l'expérience, la plupart de nos stagiaires restent dans l'entreprise après la période de stage. Puisque nous souhaitons que vous vous concentriez sur ce qui compte, nous proposons des avantages complets qui favorisent le bien-être mental, physique et financier. Vous bénéficierez de : - Une politique de travail hybride - 50 % de réduction sur les marques VF - Une salle de sport sur place proposant des initiatives santé et bien-être - Une cantine subventionnée, ainsi que des espaces de détente proposant des boissons gratuites - Une navette pour le bureau ou une réduction sur les transports en commun, selon votre localisation - Une communauté de stagiaires florissante, avec des personnes d'horizons, de modes de vie et de nationalités divers qui aiment travailler ensemble. Libre d'être, inclusion et appartenance En tant qu'employeur garantissant l'égalité des chances, nous nous efforçons de favoriser une culture d'appartenance basée sur le respect, la connexion, l'ouverture et l'authenticité. Nous nous engageons à créer et à maintenir un lieu de travail qui célèbre la diversité de nos associés, leur permettant d'apporter leur authenticité au travail chaque jour. Êtes-vous partant ? Postulez maintenant – une candidature anticipée augmente vos chances ! #prêtàpostuler R-20260213-0011

jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Data Science Intern for our Digital Technology team. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! We are looking for a Data Science Intern for: - Supporting the Data Science product lifecycle management: Data Mining, Data Cleaning, Data Exploration, Feature engineering, Predictive modelling - Run ad hoc data extract and data transformation across different data source - Run preliminary explorative analysis to identify trends, patterns and correlations - Work in cloud environment accessing to the latest AI and GenAI technologies. What’s in it for you - Extensive exposure to different Data processing and Data Science technologies such as: Python, SQL - Exposure to end-to-end complex projects, with many chances to see how to relate with technical and business stakeholders in transformative processes inside a large Company - Exposure to Data Visualization and Business intelligence tools and creation of reporting across different domain and big data set How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - You are fluent in English with excellent verbal and written communication skills - You have curious mindset with passion for working with people - You are eager to learn and face up new challenges - You show initiative and strong drive to achieve yours and your team goals - First experience such as other internships, extracurricular activities, is considered as a plus The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Dedicated skill-building workshops & internal consulting group project - One day of work in-store gaining real insights about our brands - Networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260211-0015

descriptionByLocale.en: #VFInternshipProgram Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Data Science Intern for our Digital Technology team. ## Descrizione VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . ## Informazioni chiave - Inizio: 1° giugno 2026 - Durata: 12 mesi, tempo pieno - Stipendio mensile lordo: 1'850 CHF - Luogo: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Svizzera - Processo di selezione semplificato: 3 interviste (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potenziale Business Case) ## Requisiti di ammissibilità - Devi essere in corso di laurea dopo il 1° maggio 2026 O - Devi avere uno status di studente a giugno 2026 - Devi essere cittadino dell'UE o dell'Area Economica Europea (EEA) ## Ruolo Siamo alla ricerca di un Data Science Intern per: - Supportare il ciclo di vita del prodotto Data Science: Miniera di dati, Pulizia dei dati, Esplorazione dei dati, Ingegneria dei feature, Modellazione predittiva - Eseguire estrazioni di dati ad hoc e trasformazioni dei dati across differenti fonti di dati - Eseguire analisi esplorativa preliminare per identificare tendenze, pattern e correlazioni - Lavorare in un ambiente cloud accedendo alle ultime tecnologie AI e GenAI ## Cosa offriamo - Esposizione estensiva a diverse tecnologie di elaborazione dei dati e scienza dei dati come: Python, SQL - Esposizione a progetti complessi end-to-end, con molte possibilità di vedere come relazionarsi con stakeholder tecnici e di business in processi trasformativi all'interno di una grande azienda - Esposizione a strumenti di visualizzazione dei dati e di business intelligence e creazione di reporting across differenti domini e grandi set di dati ## Contatto - Sono fluente in inglese con eccellenti abilità di comunicazione verbale e scritta - Ho un mindset curioso con passione per lavorare con le persone - Sono pronto a imparare e affrontare nuove sfide - Mostra iniziativa e forte drive per raggiungere i tuoi e i tuoi obiettivi di squadra - La prima esperienza, come altri stage, attività extracurricolari, è considerata come un plus ## Il Programma di Internato VF EMEA Il Programma di Internato VF EMEA è un percorso di 12 mesi progettato per sviluppare e potenziare talenti emergenti all'inizio della loro carriera. Siamo impegnati a liberare il tuo potenziale, quindi puoi aspettarti un percorso di apprendimento strutturato e una ricca esperienza pratica, compresa: - Laboratori di formazione dedicati e gruppo di consulenza interna - Un giorno di lavoro in negozio per guadagnare informazioni reali sui nostri marchi - Opportunità di networking con pari e leadership senior Non possiamo garantire che l'internato ti porterà a un contratto successivo, ma grazie al valore dell'esperienza la maggior parte dei nostri interni rimane nella società dopo la fine dell'internato. ## Benefici - Politica di lavoro ibrida - Sconto del 50% sui marchi VF - Palestra in loco, offrendo iniziative di salute e benessere - Cucina sussidiata, nonché aree di pausa offrendo bevande gratuite - Autobus navetta per l'ufficio o sconto sul trasporto pubblico, a seconda della tua ubicazione - Comunità di interni in crescita, con persone di diversi background, stili di vita e nazionalità che amano lavorare insieme. ## Libero di essere, Inclusione e appartenenza Come datore di lavoro uguale, ci impegniamo a creare una cultura di appartenenza basata sul rispetto, sulla connessione, sull'apertura e sull'autenticità. Siamo impegnati a costruire e mantenere un luogo di lavoro che celebra la diversità dei nostri associati, consentendo loro di portare le loro autentiche identità al lavoro ogni giorno. Sei pronto?
descriptionByLocale.it: #Programma di Internato VF Sii un sognatore, fai la differenza! Unisciti al #Programma di Internato VF in nostra sede EMEA a Stabio, Svizzera come Tirocinio Data Science per il nostro team di Digital Technology. ## Descrizione VF sta ridefinendo cosa significa essere la migliore azienda di abbigliamento, calzature e attrezzature del mondo, supportando marchi iconici come The North Face, Vans e Timberland. Scopri di più su http://vfc.com. ## Informazioni chiave - Inizio: 1° giugno 2026 - Durata: 12 mesi, tempo pieno - Stipendio mensile lordo: 1'850 CHF - Luogo: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Svizzera - Processo di selezione semplificato: 3 interviste (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potenziale Business Case) ## Requisiti di ammissibilità - Devi essere in corso di laurea dopo il 1° maggio 2026 O - Devi avere uno status di studente a giugno 2026 - Devi essere cittadino dell'UE o dell'Area Economica Europea (EEA) ## Ruolo Siamo alla ricerca di un Tirocinio Data Science per: - Supportare il ciclo di vita del prodotto Data Science: Miniera di dati, Pulizia dei dati, Esplorazione dei dati, Ingegneria dei feature, Modellazione predittiva - Eseguire estrazioni di dati ad hoc e trasformazioni dei dati across differenti fonti di dati - Eseguire analisi esplorativa preliminare per identificare tendenze, pattern e correlazioni - Lavorare in un ambiente cloud accedendo alle ultime tecnologie AI e GenAI ## Cosa offriamo - Esposizione estensiva a diverse tecnologie di elaborazione dei dati e scienza dei dati come: Python, SQL - Esposizione a progetti complessi end-to-end, con molte possibilità di vedere come relazionarsi con stakeholder tecnici e di business in processi trasformativi all'interno di una grande azienda - Esposizione a strumenti di visualizzazione dei dati e di business intelligence e creazione di reporting across differenti domini e grandi set di dati ## Contatto - Sono fluente in inglese con eccellenti abilità di comunicazione verbale e scritta - Ho un mindset curioso con passione per lavorare con le persone - Sono pronto a imparare e affrontare nuove sfide - Mostra iniziativa e forte drive per raggiungere i tuoi e i tuoi obiettivi di squadra - descriptionByLocale.de: #VF-Praktikumsprogramm Sei ein Traum, mach den Unterschied! Join #VF-Praktikumsprogramm in unserer EMEA-Zentrale in Stabio, Schweiz als Data Science-Praktikant für unser Digital Technology-Team. ## Beschreibung VF definiert neu, was es bedeutet, die weltbeste Bekleidungs-, Schuh- und Ausrüstungsgesellschaft zu sein, unterstützt ikonische Aktivleben-Marken wie The North Face, Vans und Timberland. Mehr erfahren unter http://vfc.com. ## Schlüsselinformationen - Beginn: 1. Juni 2026 - Dauer: 12 Monate, Vollzeit - Monatlicher Brutto-Netto-Bezugsanspruch: 1'850 CHF - Standort: VF EMEA-Zentrale in Stabio, Schweiz - Vereinfachter Auswahlprozess: 3 Interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potenzieller Business Case) ## Zulassungsvoraussetzungen - Du musst nach dem 1. Mai 2026 in einem Studium sein oder - Du musst im Juni 2026 einen Studentenstatus haben - Du musst EU- oder EWR-Bürger sein ## Rolle Wir suchen einen Data Science-Praktikanten für: - Unterstützung des Produktlebenszyklus Data Science: Datenmine, Datenreinigung, Datenexploration, Feature-Engineering, Vorhersagemodellierung - Durchführung von ad-hoc-Datenauszügen und -transformationen aus verschiedenen Datenquellen - Durchführung von vorläufigen explorativen Analysen, um Trends, Muster und Korrelationen zu identifizieren - Arbeiten in einem Cloud-Umgebung mit Zugriff auf die neuesten AI- und GenAI-Technologien ## Was wir bieten - Umfassende Einführung in verschiedene Datenverarbeitungstechnologien und -wissenschaften wie: Python, SQL - Einführung in komplexe End-to-End-Projekte, mit vielen Möglichkeiten, sich mit technischen und Geschäftsstakeholdern in Transformationsprozessen innerhalb eines großen Unternehmens zu verbinden - Einführung in Datenvisualisierungstools und Business-Intelligence-Tools und Erstellung von Berichten über verschiedene Domänen und große Datensätze ## Kontakt - Du bist fließig in Englisch mit hervorragenden mündlichen und schriftlichen Kommunikationsfähigkeiten - Du hast einen kuriösen Mindset mit Leidenschaft für das Arbeiten mit Menschen - Du bist bereit, zu lernen und neue Herausforderungen anzunehmen - Du zeigst Initiative und starken Antrieb, um deine und deine Teamziele zu erreichen - Die erste Erfahrung, wie andere Praktika, extracurriculare Aktivitäten, wird als Plus angesehen ## Das VF-EMEA-Praktikumsprogramm Das VF-EMEA-Praktikumsprogramm ist ein 12-Monats-Programm, das darauf abzielt, junge Talente am Anfang ihrer Karriere zu entwickeln und zu stärken. Wir sind verpflichtet, dein Potenzial zu entfalten, also kannst du erwarten, ein strukturiertes Lernprogramm und eine reiche Praxiserfahrung zu erhalten, einschließlich: - Dedicierter Schulungs- und Beratungsgruppen - Ein Tag im Verkauf, um echte Informationen über unsere Marken zu sammeln - Networking-Möglichkeiten mit Gleichaltrigen und Senior-Führungskräften Wir können nicht garantieren, dass das Praktikum zu einem späteren Vertrag führt, aber dank des Wertes der Erfahrung bleibt die Mehrheit unserer Praktikanten in der Gesellschaft nach Abschluss des Praktikums. ## Vorteile - Hybrid-Arbeitspolitik - 50-Prozent-Rabatt auf VF-Marken - In-House-Fitnessstudio, das Gesundheits- und Wellnessinitiativen anbietet - Subventionierte Küche, sowie Ruhebereiche, die kostenlose Getränke anbieten - Bus-Verbindung zum Büro oder Rabatt auf den öffentlichen Verkehr, je nach deiner Lage - Wachsende Community von Praktikanten, mit Menschen aus verschiedenen Hintergründen, Lebensstilen und Nationalitäten, die gerne zusammenarbeiten. ## Frei sein, Inklusion und Zugehörigkeit Als gleichberechtigter Arbeitgeber engagieren wir uns, eine Kultur der Zugehörigkeit zu schaffen, die auf Respekt, Verbindung, Offenheit und Authentizität basiert. Wir sind verpflichtet, einen Arbeitsplatz zu schaffen, der die Vielfalt unserer Mitarbeiter feiert, indem sie ihre wahren Identitäten jeden Tag am Arbeitsplatz bringen. Bist du bereit? Bewirb dich jetzt – die frühe Bewerbung erhöht deine Chancen! #readytoapply R-20260211-0015
descriptionByLocale.fr: #Programme de stage VF Sois un rêveur, fais la différence ! Rejoins #Programme de stage VF dans notre siège EMEA à Stabio, Suisse en tant que stagiaire en Data Science pour notre équipe de technologie numérique. ## Description VF redéfinit ce que signifie être la meilleure entreprise de vêtements, chaussures et équipements du monde, soutenant des marques iconiques comme The North Face, Vans et Timberland. En savoir plus sur http://vfc.com. ## Informations clés - Début : 1er juin 2026 - Durée : 12 mois, temps plein - Salaire mensuel brut : 1'850 CHF - Emplacement : VF EMEA Headquarters à Stabio, Suisse - Processus de sélection simplifié : 3 entretiens (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potentiel de cas d'affaires) ## Exigences d'admission - Tu dois être en cours d'études après le 1er mai 2026 ou - Tu dois avoir un statut d'étudiant en juin 2026 - Tu dois être citoyen de l'UE ou de l'Espace économique européen (EEE) ## Rôle Nous recherchons un stagiaire en Data Science pour : - Soutenir le cycle de vie du produit Data Science : mine de données, nettoyage des données, exploration des données, ingénierie de fonctionnalités, modélisation prédictive - Effectuer des extractions de données ad-hoc et des transformations de données à partir de différentes sources de données - Effectuer des analyses exploratoires préliminaires pour identifier des tendances, des modèles et des corrélations - Travailler dans un environnement cloud avec accès aux dernières technologies AI et GenAI ## Ce que nous offrons - Une exposition étendue à différentes technologies de traitement de données et de science des données comme : Python, SQL - Une exposition à des projets complexes end-to-end, avec de nombreuses possibilités de voir comment interagir avec des stakeholders techniques et commerciaux dans des processus de transformation au sein d'une grande entreprise - Une exposition à des outils de visualisation de données et de business intelligence et à la création de rapports à partir de différents domaines et de grands ensembles de données ## Contact - Tu es fluide en anglais avec de bonnes compétences en communication verbale et écrite - Tu as un mindset curieux avec une passion pour travailler avec les gens - Tu es prêt à apprendre et à relever de nouvelles défis - Tu montres de l'initiative et un fort drive pour atteindre tes objectifs et ceux de ton équipe - La première expérience, comme d'autres stages, activités extracurriculaires, est considérée comme un plus ## Le programme de stage VF EMEA Le programme de stage VF EMEA est un programme de 12 mois conçu pour développer et renforcer les talents émergents au début de leur carrière. Nous sommes engagés à libérer ton potentiel, donc tu peux attendre un programme d'apprentissage structuré et une expérience pratique riche, incluant : - Des laboratoires de formation dédiés et un groupe de conseil interne - Un jour de travail dans un magasin pour acquérir des informations réelles sur nos marques - Des opportunités de networking avec des pairs et des leaders seniors Nous ne pouvons pas garantir que le stage te mènera à un contrat ultérieur, mais grâce à la valeur de l'expérience, la plupart de nos stagiaires restent dans l'entreprise après la fin du stage. ## Avantages - Politique de travail hybride - Réduction de 50 % sur les marques VF - Salle de sport sur place, offrant des initiatives de santé et de bien-être - Cuisine subventionnée, ainsi que des espaces de pause offrant des boissons gratuites - Navette pour l'entreprise ou réduction sur les transports publics, en fonction de votre emplacement - Communauté de stagiaires en croissance, avec des personnes de différents horizons, styles de vie et nationalités qui aiment travailler ensemble. ## Libre d'être, Inclusion et appartenance En tant qu'employeur égalitaire, nous nous engageons à créer une culture d'appartenance basée sur le respect, la connexion, l'ouverture et l'authenticité. Nous sommes engagés à construire et maintenir un lieu de travail qui célèbre la diversité de nos employés, leur permettant de porter leurs identités authentiques au travail chaque jour. Es-tu prêt ? Candidats maintenant – l'application précoce augmente tes chances ! #readytoapply R-20260211-0015

jobs.title: Digital Retail Technology & Gen AI Intern - EMEA Internship Program
jobs.location: EMEA · CHE · Stabio · VF Campus VF1
jobs.description: Be a dreamer, make the difference! Join #VFInternshipProgram in our EMEA HQ in Stabio, Switzerland as Digital Retail Technology & Gen AI Intern for our Digital Technology team. About VF VF is redefining what it means to be the world’s best apparel, footwear and equipment company, powering iconic active lifestyle brands including The North Face®, Vans® and Timberland®. Learn more at http://vfc.com . Key information - Start date: June 1st, 2026 - Duration: 12 months , full-time - Gross monthly salary: 1’850 CHF - Location: VF EMEA Headquarters in Stabio, Switzerland - Streamlined recruitment process: 3 interviews (Recruiter, Hiring Manager, potential Business Case) Eligibility requirements - You must be graduating after May 1st, 2026 OR you must have a student status as of June 2026 - You must hold EU or EEA (European Economic Area) citizenship Let’s talk about the role! Are you passionate about Retail Technology and eager to explore how GenAI is transforming the consumer and store experience? As a Digital Retail Technology & Gen AI Intern, you will support the design, analysis and evolution of digital retail solutions across stores and omnichannel platforms, with a focus also on GenAI use cases, data‑driven decision making, and retail technology innovation. You will collaborate with cross‑functional teams to translate business needs into scalable, technology‑enabled solutions that enhance efficiency and customer experience. Here’s what you’ll be responsible for: - Support the analysis and documentation of retail technology processes (e.g. store systems, Order Management Systems, clienteling, order fulfilment, and omnichannel flows) - Contribute to GenAI initiatives, including use‑case discovery, functional analysis, prompt experimentation, and performance evaluation - Assist in translating business and user needs into functional requirements and solution concepts - Collaborate with product owners, engineers, data teams, and business stakeholders across EMEA - Contribute to data analysis, dashboards, or insight generation to support informed decision‑making - Support pilot initiatives, proof‑of‑concepts, and continuous improvement activities related to digital retail platforms How you will make a difference Skills that will make you succeed: - Strong interest in Retail Technology, Digital Commerce, and Store Technologies - Solid understanding of Generative AI concepts (e.g. LLMs, prompt engineering, AI‑assisted analytics) and curiosity to apply them in a business context - Analytical mindset with the ability to structure problems and interpret data - Familiarity with digital platforms, data flows, APIs, or cloud‑based systems is a plus - Ability to collaborate effectively in cross‑functional and international teams - Proactive attitude, learning mindset, and willingness to experiment and iterate - Fluency in English (written and spoken); knowledge of additional languages is a plus - A degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, Data Science, Business Technology, or similar is nice to have, but we are most interested in your curiosity, problem‑solving skills, and passion for retail innovation. What’s in it for you In this role, you will: - Gain hands‑on exposure to enterprise retail technology platforms used by global brands - Learn how GenAI is applied in real business scenarios, from process optimization to decision support - Work within an Agile, product‑driven environment, learning modern digital delivery practices - Collaborate with experienced product, technology, and business professionals across EMEA - Build a strong foundation for a career in Digital Retail, Product Management, or AI‑enabled Transformation By the end of the internship, you will have: - A practical understanding of retail digital ecosystems - Experience contributing to GenAI‑enabled initiatives - Increased confidence working with stakeholders, data, and technology solutions in a global organization The VF EMEA Internship Program is a 12-month journey designed to develop and empower emerging talents at the start of their careers. We are committed to unleashing your potential, so you can expect a structured learning path and rich hands-on experience , including: - Participate in dedicated skill-building workshops - Collaborate on an internal consulting group project - Gain real insights about our brands by spending one day of work in-store - Connect through networking opportunities with peers and senior leadership We cannot grant that the internship will lead you to a contract afterwards, but thanks to the value of the experience most of our interns are staying in the company after the internship period. Since we want you to focus on what matters, we offer comprehensive benefits that encourage mental, physical, and financial well-being. You will enjoy: - Hybrid working policy - 50% discount on VF brands - On site gym, offering health and well-being initiatives - Subsidized canteen, as well as break out areas offering complimentary drinks - Shuttle bus to the office or discount on public transport, depending on your location - A thriving interns’ community, with people of diverse backgrounds, lifestyles, and nationalities who love working together. Free to Be, Inclusion & Belonging As an equal opportunity employer, we strive to foster a culture of belonging based on respect, connection, openness and authenticity. We are committed to building and maintaining a workplace that celebrates the diversity of our associates, allowing them to bring their authentic selves to work every day. Are you in? Apply now – early application increases your chances! #readytoapply R-20260209-0007
